listing_name: A Beary Pine Cabin near Dollywood, Cal Ripkin!
description:
Upgraded! New sunset deck, new foosball table, Keurig, mattresses, more. Just 2 miles to Cal Ripkin, LeConte Center, Dollywood, Old Mill Restaurant, and Ferris Wheel!. Close to where you want to be! Just minutes to Gatlinburg, too!

If you are the type of person that enjoys a mountain stay, yet want to be near great dining, fun attractions, wonderful shopping, and hiking, biking, and outdoor activities, then this is the perfect place for you.

No sickening curvy mountain roads. Easy access!

The space
Described as one of the most fantastic locations in Pigeon Forge, A Beary Pine Cabin is located about 1 mile from the Pigeon Forge Parkway, Dollywood, The Old Mill and all of sites and attractions which the area is famous.

Enjoy amenities that will make for a wonderful Smoky Mountain vacation. You and your guests will enjoy an Outdoor Hot Tub, Indoor Jetted Tub, Fireplace, HDTV, High Speed Wireless Internet, Pool Table, BBQ grill, Foosball Table, Arcade Game with 60 classics like Pac-Man and Donkey Kong, and much more!

The cabin is located in a quiet mountain area that is easily accessible year round. Recent improvements are yours to enjoy including; new wood laminate flooring, new furniture, new beds, new HDTV, new jetted tub, new Arcade game, and more. A Beary Pine Cabin is a three level home with three full baths which can comfortably accommodate 6-8 guests. There are 2 queen beds, one of which is in a loft bedroom, and a king bed for 6 guests. A queen sleeper sofa is available for 2 additional people. Most of the year there is only a 2 night minimum stay. During holidays and some peak days it is 3 nights.

We offer hassle free check-in using unique electronic key codes for you. Because of insurance, primary renter must be 25 years old or older and no pets. Gas fireplace not on during summer months.

Keurig Coffee Machine and regular coffee maker in the kitchen. Be sure to bring your favorite flavors!

Thanks for your interest!

Guest access
All that the Great Smoky Mountains has to offer!

Other things to note
You will receive instructions and a keycode about three days prior to your stay to self check in via message. Trash day is on Thursday morning, please make sure trash can is at the road and place any of your trash inside. The WiFi password is on the light switch. There is one security camera overlooking the parking area only (does not show porch or any other area).

listing_name: Cherokee Lodge
description:
This spacious 3 story 4 bedroom 3 1/2 bath cabin sleeps 12 and is located near Pigeon Forge, TN in the foothills of the Great Smoky Mountains and only a mile from Dollywood. It has a fully equipped kitchen and free Wireless High Speed Internet.

The space
Welcome to Cherokee Lodge, a spacious pet-friendly 3 story 4 bedroom cabin that sleeps 12 and is located near Pigeon Forge, TN in the foothills of the Great Smoky Mountains. Located just 1 mile from Dollywood and perfect for large families, group getaways and has free Wireless Internet Access.

Cherokee Lodge has all the amenities to make your stay in the Tennessee Smokies a pleasure. The furnishings of this luxury cabin are delightful and the atmosphere is welcoming so it's is easy to see why most guests who stay here come back again and again.

The overstuffed sofa in the living room provides a place to relax and enjoy the comfort and warmth of the stone fireplace while making plans to see the many attractions of Pigeon Forge and the Great Smoky Mountains.

The master bedroom has a four poster king size bed where you can rest and energize from the days adventures. The bathroom has double vanities, jetted Jacuzzi tub, and private water shed. Before retiring for the night or first thing in the morning relax in the soothing waters of the jetted tub.

Before retiring to one of the bedrooms, sit on the sofa, relax, and recant the adventures of the day on your well deserved vacation in the Smokies.

Descend the stairs from the living room to the game room that is sure to provide hours of pleasure in the company of friends and family with a pool table, arcade, Foosball table, stone fireplace, TV, stereo, and queen sleeper sofa.

The bedroom on the bottom floor of the Cherokee Lodge cabin has a comfortable king size bed, TV, and access to the lower level deck.

You don't want to miss the opportunity to soak in the bubbling waters of your hot tub located on the main level deck where you will be able enjoy the beautiful mountain scenery while enjoying the relaxing warm water of your own hot tub. Maybe one of the rockers is more to your pleasure.

Whichever you prefer, just sit back, breathe the country air, and listen to the mournful sound of Dollywood's train whistle way in the distance. With a wrap around deck on all 4 sides of this beautiful Smokies log cabin, you won't ever want to leave this luxurious vacation cabin rental.

Meals will be a treat in the roomy fully equipped kitchen where preparation of breakfast, lunch, and dinner is a breeze and the dishwasher makes clean ups quick and easy and everyone will appreciate that on vacation.

The dining table has four chairs and a bench will seat up to seven with no problem so there is more than enough room for everyone to enjoy a great meal in the cabin and the fellowship dining together in private provides.

Maybe, your family prefers the taste of food prepared outdoors so fire up the gas grill and savor your meal on the deck while enjoying your view of the mountains while taking in the fresh air and peace and quiet.

On the main floor has a half bath conveniently located and a washer and dryer discreetly tucked away in its own closet.

Make sure to leave time in your schedule time to visit one of our dinner shows such as Dixie Stampede, or Hatfield and McCoys at Wonderworks.

Maybe, some of the ladies will want to get in some shopping in at the Tanger Outlet Mall at Five Oaks or one of the many others shops all along the parkway in Pigeon Forge.

A large choice of restaurants in the Smokies abound a short distance away in Pigeon Forge, Gatlinburg, Wears Valley, and Sevierville.

If your group is larger than 12 , you may want to inquire about the availability of the nearby Country Living cabin rental which sleeps up to 12.

Cherokee Lodge is a magical place where family and friends can come together to make lifetime memories, so make you reservation today for your next family gathering or group getaway.

description:
Moose Hollow Lodge is a one of a kind spectacular massive lodge nestled in a private setting in Pigeon Forge Tennessee, a private heated indoor pool, and a chapel. We urge you to check out all of our 5-Star reviews. We look forward to helping you build lasting memories.

The space
With 9 large bedrooms and 8.5 bathrooms, Moose Hollow Lodge offers a private heated indoor pool and an onsite private chapel/conference center for your full time use. Our large lodge is just minutes from Dollywood, all the Pigeon Forge attractions, and the Smoky Mountain National Park.

Take a dip in Pigeon Forge’s most luxurious swimming pool. The indoor swimming pool sits just 150 feet from the lodge with beautiful 10×10 cathedral beam construction and an abundance of windows, built to accommodate all of your relaxing needs. The pool is climate controlled at industry standards for maximum comfort and reduced humidity. The pool size is 12’x30′, has a maximum depth of 6.5 feet, and is kept at a comfortable 81 degrees year-round! This indoor swimming pool facility features a fireplace that reaches to the peak of the structure and boasts a beautiful 50″ hearth to provide maximum comfort, luxury, and environment!

For those of you that enjoy barbecuing; just outside is a covered porch and sitting area with four picnic tables, two park style grills and one gas grill where you can watch your friends and family enjoy their swim and cook up your favorite burgers and hot dogs.

listing_name: Secluded, Mountain Views, Dollywood, Hot Tub, Pets
description:
Welcome to Thistle Britches Cabin 🌲 Private & Secluded: Peaceful 1-acre property. 🔥 Fire Pit: Relax under the stars with mountain views. 💦 Hot Tub: 56 jets, Bluetooth, subwoofer, LED waterfall. 🌐 WiFi: Fast 321 Mbps for work or streaming. 🎶 Sound: Alexa Echo + premium surround sound. 📺 Streaming: Hulu, Netflix, Disney+, ESPN+, Prime Video. 🎮 Games: Pool table, arcade, darts, cornhole. 🛋️ Comfort: Cozy design with modern amenities.

The space
Thistle Britches Cabin: Unparalleled Privacy & Panoramic Views. Escape to the most private cabin on the mountain, surrounded by 800 acres of untouched woodlands. As the highest cabin on the mountain, enjoy unparalleled views of the Smoky Mountains, Pigeon Forge, and Gatlinburg. Watch the sunrise with your coffee or the sunset with a glass of wine—every moment is picture-perfect. Experience the perfect combination of privacy, comfort, and peace of mind at Thistle Britches Cabin! 🌲

Guest access
Enjoy complete privacy with exclusive access to the entire cabin and the spacious 1-acre yard. Whether you’re relaxing indoors or exploring the serene outdoor space, it’s all yours to enjoy!

Other things to note
Kitchen & Outdoor Cooking
The kitchen is fully stocked with all the appliances, cookware, and spices you’ll need to prepare delicious meals. For outdoor cooking, a propane grill is conveniently located on the deck (propane is provided).

Question: Where Are the Sleeper Sofas Located?
The cabin has 3 levels, each thoughtfully designed for comfort and functionality:

First Floor (Media Room):

Features 2 red microfiber queen-size sleeper sofas, TV, Xbox

Perfect for children, this space connects to the king-size bedroom, offering flexibility for families with kids or extra guests.

The first floor is separated by an enclosed stairway, ensuring peace and quiet from the upper levels.

Second Floor (Main Living Area):

Includes a queen sleeper sofa in the living room for guests who prefer to stay on the same floor as the kitchen and dining area.

Open-concept design with access to the main deck, making it a cozy spot for gathering.

Third Floor (Game Loft):

This level has no sleeper sofas but offers entertainment with a pool table, darts, and a sitting table.
Positioned far from the first floor, it allows adults to enjoy the game area without disturbing sleeping children downstairs.

Question: How Close Are the Other Cabins to Thistle Britches?

Privacy & Space:

Thistle Britches Cabin sits on 1 full acre, ensuring peace and quiet.

It’s surrounded on three sides by dense woodlands and enjoys the highest elevation of all cabins on the mountain.
Surroundings:

Right of the Cabin: Pure woodlands stretching up the mountain ridge, leading to a stunning 30-mile valley view.

Behind the Cabin: Endless woodlands extend about 500 feet to a point where you can enjoy breathtaking 180-degree views of the Smoky Mountains and Mt. LeConte.

Left-Front Corner: Woodland and small brush gently slope down 400 feet to the road below, offering complete visual separation from nearby cabins.

Right-Front Corner: The nearest cabin is about a football field’s length away, with plenty of trees for privacy. Their deck faces away from yours, ensuring no disturbances.

Enhanced Cleaning Standards

We prioritize your health and safety with thorough cleaning protocols, including:

Linens: All bedding and towels are washed at high temperatures and remain sealed until use.
Surfaces: Microban™, Lysol™, and bleach-based cleaners are used on all hard and soft surfaces throughout the cabin.

Inspection: Post-cleaning inspections ensure quality and apply additional disinfectants as needed.
Staff Safety: All cleaning staff are trained in proper sanitization techniques and equipped with gloves and protective gear.

Experience the perfect combination of privacy, comfort, and peace of mind at Thistle Britches Cabin! 🌲

listing_name: Views Views Views Private Honeymoon-Hot Tub - HMV1
description:
Honeymoon View #1 sports one of the best mountain views. It is about 5 minutes off the Parkway of Pigeon Forge. This honeymoon log cabin is perfect for a honeymoon get a way. It has a hot tub, pool table, wood burning fireplace & Charcoal Park Grill. Allows dogs 20 lbs and under $100 pet fee per dog (limit 2) No other pets allowed. Absolutely NO Cats
**All information contained herein deemed reliable, but not guaranteed. Renter should personally verify all information**

The space
Honeymoon View #1 is a rustic style log cabin where everything in the cabin is hand done. Beautiful mountain views are all around. Only 5 minutes off the Parkway of Pigeon Forge. Paved all the way too it. Winter months suggest 4 wheel drive and chains.

Guest access
Swimming pool access is at our resort, Black Bear Ridge Resort and is open from April 1st until Oct 1st weather permitting. Directions: to Pool Angel's View Wedding chapel, Reception Hall and Salon/Day Spa
From the main parkway in Pigeon Forge (Hwy441), turn at traffic light #3 onto Wears Valley Rd. (Hwy 321)
Go about 3 miles, when the 4 lane becomes a 2 lane, turn left onto Lost Branch Rd.
Go 8/10 of a mile and turn right onto Black Bear Cub Way, Go through the resort and turn at the first left, which is High Rock Way. Follow High Rock Way until you see the chapel and reception hall on the right. The chapel office and coordinating room will be in the taller portion of the buildings on the top. Thank you and have a safe trip.
Do not try to GPS . These are incorrect. We are trying to resolve the problem.
Our physical address is 1740 High Rock way Sevierville, TN 37862

Other things to note
Very Romantic and great for a honeymoon.
When you check in please be sure to ask for Your discount package to various activities in Pigeon Forge. You will need to bring your personal items such as toothbrush, toothpaste, shampoos and soaps.(also laundry soap) You will be provided with a start up of paper towels and toilet paper, dish packs for dishwasher. Longer stays will need to pick some of these items at the grocery store, which there is one at our check in office. Towels and linens are provided also along with pots, pans, dishes, utensils, etc..There are no refunds for mechanical failures; however, we need you to report any issues immediately so that we may take care of any problems you may have. Otherwise, we do not bother you while you are on vacation. Check out procedures will be gave to you at check in. We expect the cabin left the way you found it. Please bag up all trash and wash your dishes and put away or leave in dishwasher running for maids to put away. We appreciate you business and we want the cabins to be in good shape for the next guests. Any damages over 500 dollars is a Class C1 Felony. We just ask that you be a responsible renter. We want you to enjoy your time with us. Again, this cabin is on a private mountain you may need front wheel drive or 4 wheel drive...especially in winter months.

listing_name: Base Camp - Unit 1305 - Mountain View Condos
description:
- FREE Attraction Ticket with EACH night Stay Including Dollywood

The space
Experience the allure of this beautiful condo, a perfect retreat for your Pigeon Forge getaway! Immerse yourself in relaxation with a refreshing swim in one of the two pools after a day of shopping, or unwind by grilling on the expansive green space, offering ample room to roam after an adventure at Anakeesta (where you can receive a complimentary ticket!). It signals the start of an exceptional journey. With two spacious bedrooms, this condo comfortably accommodates up to six guests, ensuring cherished memories for all.

Experience the ultimate mountain retreat in this inviting condo boasting a versatile bedding configuration:
- King-sized bed in Master Bedroom
- Queen-sized bed in Second Bedroom
- Queen Sleeper Sofa in the Den

Each bedroom is equipped with a TV and a ceiling fan, ensuring comfort and entertainment. The living area hosts a generous flat screen TV, positioned in front of ample seating for your family. With two full bathrooms, including a master with a garden tub and shower, you'll find comfort and convenience.

Experience the convenience of upgraded WiFi services, enhancing your connectivity and enjoyment throughout your stay in our units. Stay effortlessly connected and entertained with our high-speed internet access.

The outdoor pool boasts a playful mushroom water feature, perfect for the enjoyment of children or even yourself, and is heated typically in April and May, depending on the outside temperature. The indoor pool maintains an inviting temperature and is heated year-round. Our resort presents an abundance of space, featuring several gathering and picnic areas, along with outdoor grills. A highlight is our newest amenity – a quarter-mile walking trail on our expansive five-acre green space. The grounds further showcase a variety of outdoor activities, such as tetherball, a volleyball court, horseshoes, two playgrounds, a basketball court, and shuffleboard. The sprawling area ensures an enjoyable experience for both you and your children! All buildings at our resort feature elevators for accessibility. Units are wheelchair accessible. Each unit offers free parking for your car.

The fully stocked kitchen encompasses a refrigerator/freezer, dishwasher, microwave, and stove/oven. We supply dishes, glassware, pot and pan sets, a toaster, a blender, and a coffee maker. For specialized items such as a wok, rice steamer, or crockpot, we recommend bringing your own, as these are not provided. Enjoy complimentary amenities, including free Wi-Fi, cable TV in the rooms, and local phone service. Sheets and towel sets are provided for your stay, though they cannot be changed out. A full washer and dryer are also available in this unit. While we provide a single-use box of detergent, you may wish to bring extra if you plan to do laundry. An iron and ironing board are included. This resort is pet-free, smoke-free, and strictly prohibits trailers.

As a token of our appreciation for choosing Hazelrig Enterprises, you'll receive one free admission daily to popular attractions, including Dollywood, Hatfield & McCoy Feud and Dinner Show, and The Pirate Show Dinner Show. No timeshare presentations or mandatory purchases are involved in this program. A stay with us entitles you to 1 ticket choice per day of stay from an activities package totaling $1,059 with our partner Xplorie.

Conveniently positioned on Plaza Drive between traffic lights 0 and 1, directly behind Country Tonight in the entertainment district, our resort provides easy access to a trolley stop at the main road, offering rides throughout Pigeon Forge for a nominal fee of $.50. Dollywood, softball fields, and The Island, featuring Margaritaville and Paula Deen's, are approximately 2 miles away.

Please note that trailer or car hauler parking is strictly prohibited, and alternative arrangements can be coordinated through property management.

Check-in is hassle-free – simply show up after the designated time and enter the provided code to unlock the door. This unit is located in Building 1 on the 3rd floor, offering spectacular views. Public parking and a trolley stop at the bottom of the hill facilitate easy access to various attractions in Pigeon Forge for a nominal fee of $.50. Embark on your extraordinary vacation with us!

Guest access
All guests of the resort have FREE access to all these amenities which are ONLY found at our resort. We strive to make your stay one to remember!

Towels and linens are provided also along with pots, pans, dishes, utensils, etc..There are no refunds for mechanical failures; however, we need you to report any issues immediately so that we may take care of any problems you may have. Otherwise, we do not bother you while you are on vacation. Check out procedures will be gave to you at check in. We expect the cabin left the way you found it. Please bag up all trash and wash your dishes and put away or leave in dishwasher running for maids to put away. We appreciate you business and we want the cabins to be in good shape for the next guests. Any damages over 500 dollars is a Class C1 Felony. We just ask that you be a responsible renter. We want you to enjoy your time with us.

listing_name: Making Memories - Unit 3301 - Mountain View Condos
description:
- FREE Attraction Ticket with EACH night Stay Including Dollywood

The space
Discover the charm of this exquisite condo, an ideal sanctuary for your Pigeon Forge escape! Dive into relaxation with a revitalizing swim in one of the two pools after a day of shopping or unwind by grilling on the vast green space, providing plenty of room to roam following an adventure at Anakeesta (where you can snag a complimentary ticket!). It marks the beginning of an extraordinary experience. With three generous bedrooms, this condo effortlessly accommodates up to eight guests, guaranteeing treasured memories for everyone.

This condo boasts a sleeping arrangement that includes:
- King-sized bed in Master Bedroom
- King-sized bed in Second Bedroom
- Queen-sized bed in the Third Bedroom
- Queen Sleeper Sofa in the Den

Each bedroom is equipped with a TV and a ceiling fan, ensuring comfort and entertainment. The living area hosts a generous flat screen TV, positioned in front of ample seating for your family. With two full bathrooms, including a master with a garden tub and shower, you'll find comfort and convenience.

Experience the convenience of upgraded WiFi services, enhancing your connectivity and enjoyment throughout your stay in our units. Stay effortlessly connected and entertained with our high-speed internet access.

The outdoor pool boasts a playful mushroom water feature, perfect for the enjoyment of children or even yourself, and is heated typically in April and May, depending on the outside temperature. The indoor pool maintains an inviting temperature and is heated year-round. Our resort presents an abundance of space, featuring several gathering and picnic areas, along with outdoor grills. A highlight is our newest amenity – a quarter-mile walking trail on our expansive five-acre green space. The grounds further showcase a variety of outdoor activities, such as tetherball, a volleyball court, horseshoes, two playgrounds, a basketball court, and shuffleboard. The sprawling area ensures an enjoyable experience for both you and your children! All buildings at our resort feature elevators for accessibility. Units are wheelchair accessible. Each unit offers free parking for your car.

The fully stocked kitchen encompasses a refrigerator/freezer, dishwasher, microwave, and stove/oven. We supply dishes, glassware, pot and pan sets, a toaster, a blender, and a coffee maker. For specialized items such as a wok, rice steamer, or crockpot, we recommend bringing your own, as these are not provided. Enjoy complimentary amenities, including free Wi-Fi, cable TV in the rooms, and local phone service. Sheets and towel sets are provided for your stay, though they cannot be changed out. A full washer and dryer are also available in this unit. While we provide a single-use box of detergent, you may wish to bring extra if you plan to do laundry. An iron and ironing board are included. This resort is pet-free, smoke-free, and strictly prohibits trailers.

As a token of our appreciation for choosing Hazelrig Enterprises, you'll receive one free admission daily to popular attractions, including Dollywood, Hatfield & McCoy Feud and Dinner Show, and The Pirate Show Dinner Show. No timeshare presentations or mandatory purchases are involved in this program. A stay with us entitles you to 1 ticket choice per day of stay from an activities package totaling $1,059 with our partner Xplorie.

Conveniently positioned on Plaza Drive between traffic lights 0 and 1, directly behind Country Tonight in the entertainment district, our resort provides easy access to a trolley stop at the main road, offering rides throughout Pigeon Forge for a nominal fee of $.50. Dollywood, softball fields, and The Island, featuring Margaritaville and Paula Deen's, are approximately 2 miles away.

Please note that trailer or car hauler parking is strictly prohibited, and alternative arrangements can be coordinated through property management.

Check-in is hassle-free – simply show up after the designated time and enter the provided code to unlock the door. This unit is located in Building 3 on the 3rd floor, offering spectacular views. Public parking and a trolley stop at the bottom of the hill facilitate easy access to various attractions in Pigeon Forge for a nominal fee of $.50. Embark on your extraordinary vacation with us!

Guest access
Enjoy a relaxed vacation and check in with ease! Simply arrive at the designated check in time, enter the provided code, and you will have the key to the perfect getaway. Elevate your stay with all the comforts of home and start making memories!

listing_name: Near Dollywood • Pool Table • Family Cabin
description:
Escape to A Bear’s Tale — a Smoky Mountain cabin retreat just minutes from Dollywood, Gatlinburg, and Great Smoky Mountains National Park.

Relax in the hot tub, challenge friends to a game of pool, or unwind after a day exploring the Smokies — all thoughtfully designed for a memorable mountain getaway.

Perfect for families, couples, and small groups.

⭐ Superhost • 500+ 5-star reviews • 4.92 rating — book with confidence

The space
🔹 What Makes This Cabin Special

• Private hot tub — relax under the stars after a day exploring the Smokies
• Prime location — near Pigeon Forge, Gatlinburg, Dollywood, and the Smokies
• Pool table & games — great for couples, families, and small groups
• Beautiful year-round setting — mountain views in winter and peaceful treehouse vibes in summer
• Seasonal resort pool & hot tub access — a summer guest favorite
• Private deck with gas grill — ideal for outdoor dining and relaxing evenings
• Kid-friendly cabin — includes a Pack ’n Play, high chair, and baby gate for easier family travel
• Modern cabin comforts — WiFi, smart TVs, cozy living spaces, and full kitchen

🔹 Inside the Cabin

Designed to help you unwind, reconnect, and enjoy time together:

• Cozy living room with smart TV and stacked stone fireplace
• Fully equipped kitchen perfect for easy meals and gathering together
• Comfortable bedrooms with smart TVs throughout the cabin
• Master suite with jacuzzi tub & fireplace for a true retreat feel
• Open layout ideal for spending time together
• Upgraded pull-out bed with memory foam mattress
• Loft entertainment area with pool table and games for all ages

🔹 Outdoor Space

• Relax under the stars in the outdoor hot tub
• Spacious private deck with gas grill for outdoor dining
• Peaceful wooded setting perfect for relaxing outdoors

This is the kind of place where you can truly slow down, reconnect, and enjoy time together.

🔹 Perfect Location

You’re right where you want to be:

• 10–15 minutes to Dollywood, the Parkway, and top attractions
• Great Smoky Mountains National Park entrance — ~15 minutes
• Gatlinburg (downtown) — ~15 minutes
• Grocery & essentials — 5–10 minutes
• Easy, well-maintained roads — no steep mountain driving

🔹 Great For

• Families
• Couples
• Small groups
• Guests wanting both adventure and relaxation

🔹 Host Notes

• Mountain views are best late fall–spring; summer offers a lush, private wooded setting
• Resort pool is open Memorial Day–Labor Day (weather permitting) and located about 1 minute away within the resort

Guest access
• Keyless entry for easy, secure access
• Full access to all cabin amenities for your enjoyment

Other things to note
• Seasonal Views: Enjoy beautiful mountain sunrise views during the late fall and spring (leaf-off season). In the summer, the view transforms into a lush, wooded scene that gives the cabin a private, treehouse feel.

• Security Camera Disclosure: There is one exterior security camera located at the front of the cabin facing the parking/driveway area. It is used for safety and monitoring arrivals. No cameras are located inside the cabin or in private areas.

• Comfort: The cabin is centrally heated and air-conditioned for year-round comfort.

• Starter Supplies: We provide a starter supply of soaps, paper products, and kitchen essentials to get you settled in for your first night.

• Cleanliness: We adhere to the highest standards of cleanliness, with extra precautions in place to ensure your stay is safe and spotless.

• We respect our guests' privacy and aim to provide a seamless, independent stay. Although we won't be physically present at the property, we are always available and happy to assist with any questions or recommendations via our messaging platform. Your comfort and enjoyment are our top priorities.

• Other Properties: Need more space or sweeping long-range mountain views? Check out my other cabin, A Raven’s Tale, in scenic Wears Valley by clicking on my profile.

listing_name: Sweet Berry Patch-Unit 3706 - Mountain View Condos
description:
- FREE Attraction Ticket with EACH night Stay Including Dollywood

The space
Elevate your Pigeon Forge retreat with this exquisite top-floor condo, offering mesmerizing views that promise an unforgettable stay! Imagine waking up each morning to the aroma of fresh coffee on your balcony, and as the day unfolds, relish in the breathtaking Dollywood fireworks from that very same vantage point. We present you with a splendid space at a competitive price, inviting you to craft enduring memories with your loved ones – an experience we hope you'll choose time and again! With two roomy bedrooms, this condo effortlessly accommodates up to six guests, guaranteeing treasured memories for everyone.

This condo boasts a bedding configuration that ensures comfort and flexibility:
- King-sized bed in Master Bedroom
- King-sized bed in Second Bedroom
- Queen Sleeper Sofa in the Den

Each bedroom is equipped with a TV and a ceiling fan, ensuring comfort and entertainment. The living area hosts a generous flat screen TV, positioned in front of ample seating for your family. With two full bathrooms, including a master with a garden tub and shower, you'll find comfort and convenience.

Experience the convenience of upgraded WiFi services, enhancing your connectivity and enjoyment throughout your stay in our units. Stay effortlessly connected and entertained with our high-speed internet access.

The outdoor pool boasts a playful mushroom water feature, perfect for the enjoyment of children or even yourself, and is heated typically in April and May, depending on the outside temperature. The indoor pool maintains an inviting temperature and is heated year-round. Our resort presents an abundance of space, featuring several gathering and picnic areas, along with outdoor grills. A highlight is our newest amenity – a quarter-mile walking trail on our expansive five-acre green space. The grounds further showcase a variety of outdoor activities, such as tetherball, a volleyball court, horseshoes, two playgrounds, a basketball court, and shuffleboard. The sprawling area ensures an enjoyable experience for both you and your children! All buildings at our resort feature elevators for accessibility. Units are wheelchair accessible. Each unit offers free parking for your car.

The fully stocked kitchen encompasses a refrigerator/freezer, dishwasher, microwave, and stove/oven. We supply dishes, glassware, pot and pan sets, a toaster, a blender, and a coffee maker. For specialized items such as a wok, rice steamer, or crockpot, we recommend bringing your own, as these are not provided. Enjoy complimentary amenities, including free Wi-Fi, cable TV in the rooms, and local phone service. Sheets and towel sets are provided for your stay, though they cannot be changed out. A full washer and dryer are also available in this unit. While we provide a single-use box of detergent, you may wish to bring extra if you plan to do laundry. An iron and ironing board are included. This resort is pet-free, smoke-free, and strictly prohibits trailers.

As a token of our appreciation for choosing Hazelrig Enterprises, you'll receive one free admission daily to popular attractions, including Dollywood, Hatfield & McCoy Feud and Dinner Show, and The Pirate Show Dinner Show. No timeshare presentations or mandatory purchases are involved in this program. A stay with us entitles you to 1 ticket choice per day of stay from an activities package totaling $1,059 with our partner Xplorie.

Conveniently positioned on Plaza Drive between traffic lights 0 and 1, directly behind Country Tonight in the entertainment district, our resort provides easy access to a trolley stop at the main road, offering rides throughout Pigeon Forge for a nominal fee of $.50. Dollywood, softball fields, and The Island, featuring Margaritaville and Paula Deen's, are approximately 2 miles away.

Please note that trailer or car hauler parking is strictly prohibited, and alternative arrangements can be coordinated through property management.

Check-in is hassle-free – simply show up after the designated time and enter the provided code to unlock the door. This unit is located in Building 3 on the 7th floor, offering spectacular views. Public parking and a trolley stop at the bottom of the hill facilitate easy access to various attractions in Pigeon Forge for a nominal fee of $.50. Embark on your extraordinary vacation with us!

Guest access
All guests of the resort have FREE access to all these amenities which are ONLY found at our resort. We strive to make your stay one to remember!

listing_name: Breathtaking Views! 3 min to Dollywood, on 1 acre!
description:
Next door to Dollywood, 5 min from area attractions, close to the Parkway, and the Great Smoky Mountain National Park. You'll love my place because the views from Yogi's Den are absolutely breathtaking on 2 private, quiet acres! Newly updated with blast WIFI & premium cable, a flat yard. Close to attractions but quiet and private, surrounded by natural beauty! Outdoor dining area. The proximity to the parkway and Dollywood allows a family to come back and recharge with little time loss!

The space
With the entrance to Dollywood less than a mile from your cabin door, you can enjoy mountain fun and relaxation without all of the tourist traffic. Unlike many cabin locations at this elevation, the roads are paved. but the location is private. And, with all of the many Pigeon Forge and Gatlinburg attractions within a five mile radius, it’s hard to imagine a more convenient personal Smoky Mountain getaway – no crowded parking lots to share or neighbors right next door.

Yogi’s Den sits nestled on its own acre of heaven overlooking the Smokies – a full rustic cabin retreat, that offers its own version of “Tennessee luxury” complete with three premium channel cable televisions, fireplace, pool table, free wi-fi, full kitchen, plus a relaxing hot tub on a gorgeous “view deck” overlooking Pigeon Forge, Gatlinburg and virtually the entire Smoky Mountain range.

Yogi's Den offers a year-round opportunity for a meaningful experience - from the springtime Rhododendrom blooms, beating the heat at the Dollywood Splash Park in the summer, fall hikes and blazing scenic vistas, to the Festival of Lights and Christmas at Dollywood, the location of this cabin allows a family to come and go to recharge with virtually no significant time or distance considerations. 300mbps Blast internet.

Guest access
You will have a lock code access that is unique to you. Lock codes from former guests are disabled, not to worry about intruders. Upon accepting the rental agreement and payment, a rental confirmation will be sent to verify access, give wifi password, and a fun Area Activity Sheet will be sent.

Other things to note
I will also send you an area activity sheet and I am available to suggest restaurants, stores, scenic vistas and overlooks, hikes, waterfalls, and area attractions to make the most of your stay. However, it took me 2.5 years to choose this particular cabin. My problem is that once I get there, I don't want to tear myself away from this property! There is a scenic overlook and a front row seat to Dollywood fireworks in the backyard in front of the hot tub and decks! This property is peaceful and beautiful!

listing_name: Pigeon Forge Cabin- close to Dollywood w/ Garage
description:
Bearwood Cabin is close to family-friendly attractions, restaurants, distilleries, and the city center. Bearwood is perfect for couples and families alike. You will love the privacy of being hidden in the trees, yet being so close to all that Pigeon Forge, The Great Smoky Mountains and Gatlinburg has to offer. Guest favorites like Dollywood, The Island, The Cal Ripken Experience, and The LeConte Event Center are all less than 2 miles away. Our garage is also available for your use, just ask.

The space
We love Bearwood cabin because of its rugged hand hewn beams throughout the kitchen and living area. It's a very cozy cabin, tucked in among the trees. You can cozy up next to the fireplace in the living room, play some pool or take a soak in the hot tub. Yet we are only a few minutes drive to fantastic restaurants like the Old Mill Village, as well as many distilleries in the area. Dollywood is close enough that you can hear the whistle of the steam engine and the pop of the fireworks. It’s a perfect location for enjoying all the area has to offer and then come back to relax on your own private deck .

Guest access
You will have access to the entire cabin. There is a maid's closet that will be locked in the kitchen area. You can request access to the garage for your use. You can also request access to the small electric grill.

Other things to note
Our cabin is located in the trees and is a short drive from the Great Smoky Mountains National Park. We love and respect the wildlife in our area. This means you may see some critters like bugs, raccoons, squirrels, black bear and more during your stay. We hope you will enjoy and respect the wildlife here during your visit.

We have many accessibility features at Bearwood cabin. We provide step free access to the first level of the home. There is also a step free, walk in shower in the main bathroom with a stool provided under the sink for those that need it. A grab bar is also provided on the main shower. Feel free to ask about any specific accommodations.

We do our best to offer a low toxin environment for our guests. We do not use fragrance plug ins, and strive to limit fragranced products for our guests with chemical sensitivities. Let us know of any special needs and we can see how we can accomplish you best.

listing_name: HatsHideaway/Family Cabin/Hot Tub/Near Attractions
description:
Located just 1 mile off the Pigeon Forge Parkway, this beautifully decorated authentic log cabin offers the perfect Smoky Mountain getaway.
   •   1 mile to The Island
   •   5 miles to Dollywood
   •   10 minutes to Gatlinburg
Nestled in the highly sought-after Eagles Ridge Resort, this cabin features stunning vaulted ceilings, log timbers, and rustic charm throughout.
   •   Master suite, kitchen, and living room all on the main level
   •   Spacious parking for up to 3 vehicles.

The space
Beautifully decorated with primitive log cabin decor
Kitchen upgrades/Quartz countertops/
Newly Renovated bathroom
New Hot tub
Custom Amish furniture on porch and bedrooms.
Flat screen smart TVs in Every room
Video Arcade game and Foosball for the Kids.

Guest access
Easy entry (only 4 steps)
Living Room/Kitchen/Master King Suite/Bathroom on main level. King suite (with Jacuzzi) Downstairs with connecting bathroom between. Queen bedroom has arcade and foosball!
3 porches, 1 has new hot tub and gas grill!
Wifi and Flat Screen smart Tvs in every room.
Kitchen has Keurig coffee system, so bring your favorite k-cups.

Other things to note
Many cabins with amazing views require steep, winding drives—especially tough in winter. But some of the best scenery is right along the parks and scenic drives you’ll visit anyway. Our cabin offers the perfect balance: tucked away in the woods for that peaceful feel, yet just minutes from all the major attractions without all the winding roads.

While we don’t use the resort’s rental management (which means our guests don’t have access to their pool), the Pigeon Forge Community Center is just a mile away! It features an outdoor pool with slides and water features, a year-round indoor Olympic-size pool, a full gym, basketball court, and even a bowling alley. There’s a small daily fee (kids 4 and under are free), and it’s open year-round—unlike the resort pool, which was only open in summer. Honestly, we prefer it: fewer crowds, more space, and fun in any weather!
Note: when looking at homes with indoor heated pools, please educate yourself about the risks involved with heat, moisture and mold.

The space
Immerse yourself in the ultimate escape at Happy Time Bear 1502! This charming two-bedroom, two-bathroom condo, offering a cozy sanctuary near the heart of Pigeon Forge. Tucked within the tranquil Golf View Resort, relish the serenity of the surroundings while being conveniently close to the Gatlinburg Golf Course.

The unit boasts a king bed in the master bedroom, a queen bed in the second bedroom, and two twin roll-away cots, ensuring a comfortable stay for up to six people. As our valued guest, you'll receive one complimentary admission daily to top attractions such as Dollywood, Paula Deen's Lumberjack Feud Adventure Park, and Anakeesta.

Unwind in the welcoming living room, complete with plush furnishings, a corner fireplace, and French doors leading to a quaint balcony—perfect for enjoying morning coffee. The fully equipped kitchen simplifies meal preparation, requiring only your groceries. Pamper yourself with a Jacuzzi bath in the primary bedroom, featuring a king-size bed and en-suite bathroom, while the second bedroom offers a queen-size bed and ample storage.

Take advantage of the Golf View Resort's amenities, including indoor and outdoor pools, an indoor hot tub, sauna, and grilling areas. Whether you're an avid golfer or seeking family fun, this resort offers easy access to Pigeon Forge and Gatlinburg attractions.

Dollywood, the beloved family theme park, is a mere 10-minute drive away, promising thrills, entertainment, and memories to last a lifetime. Explore the Great Smoky Mountains National Park, just a short drive from Pigeon Forge, where picturesque trails, cascading waterfalls, and breathtaking vistas await your discovery. Experience the ultimate getaway at Happy Time Bear 1502, where unforgettable adventures await!

As a token of our appreciation for choosing Hazelrig Enterprises, you'll receive one free admission daily to popular attractions, including Dollywood, Hatfield & McCoy Feud and Dinner Show, and The Pirate Show Dinner Show. No timeshare presentations or mandatory purchases are involved in this program. listing_name: Water front log cabin on Douglas Lake
description:
The cabin is a turn of the century Appalachian log home, with all the amenities and conveniences that make life comfortable. We are just off the the main corridor heading in to the Smoky's and surrounding attractions. The cabin sits on a 4 acre knoll on Douglas Lake...this is truly a Mountain and Lake vacation! With 600 miles of shoreline to explore, this cabin is a destination unto itself. This cabin is a living museum to our Appalachian history that remind guests of simpler times and ways.

The space
The cabin is named after our families store the Pioneer Trading Post, which was located on the main street of Gatlinburg. The Pioneer Trading Post used to sell the handcrafts of 50 mountain families.
The cabins, which comprise the home were once part of a primitive Appalachian homestead, which was located on the main street in Gatlinburg when there was nothing but a few farms and a dirt road. My grandparents and their parents were one of the first founding families in the little hamlet once know as White Oak Flats.

OVERFLOWING WITH APPALACHIAN CULTURE AND HISTORY:
Each log was hand hewn by the early America Scot-Irish settlers over 150 years ago. Their craftsmanship have stood the test of time and will likely stand another 150 years. You will find early American chestnut walls and ceilings, vintage heart pine floors, spinning wheels, hand-stitched textiles, church pews, butter churns, pie safes, cedar chests, and family antiques throughout, yet with all the amenities of plush modern living. The Pioneer is available and open to welcome you and your family to make a few treasured memories of your own.

OUR TREASURED TOTEM POLE:
You will be welcomed at the doors entrance by a majestic 25 foot Totem Pole, which stands in the vaulted ceiling living area. This totem pole once stood outside the Pioneer Trading Post and was made by Chief Blue Cloud of the Cherokee Nation for Pop and Granny.

YOU'LL HAVE A 4-ACRE PRIVATE PENINSULA TO YOURSELF!
We are on a 4 acre peninsula over looking Douglas Lake. Relax, while sipping a mint julep on the front porch, while listening to the sounds of nature and the mysterious call of the whipporwhil. The property is beautifully landscaped, with small woodland trails, a camping platform, and a firepit. It's a beautiful haven, where you can truly feel away from it all.

5 BEAUTIFULLY DECORATED BEDROOMS:
Each room has its own special charm and appeal with vintage touches for the feel you only get at Granny’s house.

SCREENED IN SLEEPING PORCH:
There is also a breezy screened in sleeping porch with an antique 3/4 bed and sitting area.

4 BATHROOMS:
1 modern two-person shower
2 claw footed tubs with showers
2 outdoor showers



CHEF'S DREAM:
6 burner gas stove
Full range of cookware
Stainless steel appliances
Carrera marble and butcher-block countertops
7’ antique porcelain sink.
Also includes an arsenal of stocked spices

OUTDOOR KITCHEN, GRILL AND DINING AREA OVERLOOKING LAKE:
-Covered Outdoor dining table seats 10 in an open air environment. You're gonna love it! Huge deck overlooking jacuzzi and lake.


ROOM TO ROAM:
FISH OFF THE DOCK
FOOT TRAILS around the woodland property.
SECLUDED SPOTS and HAMMOCKS to get away.
LARGE FIRE PIT
YOGA / CAMPING PLATFORM
BOATING
SWIMMING
JET SKIING


*AMENITIES:
FLOATING DOCK
46'' Flat screen tv in living room
DVD
Wifi
Large flat screen smart TV
TV in one bedroom great for the kids
WRAP AROUND DECKS
LARGE STAINLESS STEEL BBQ
CENTRAL HEAT AND AIR
ADT SECURITY SYS
SECURITY GATE
JACUZZI
BOAT LAUNCH
AMPLE PARKING


HANDICAP ACCESSIBLE and KID FRIENDLY, HOUSE HAS RANCH STYLE LAYOUT WITH EAZY THRESHOLDS.
With ramps and wrap around decks, it fairly accessible to the elderly, handicapped and small children.
There is a flat stone path through the yard, with assistance you can push a wheelchair over it. There is a ramp up to the front porch with one average size step to get onto the main deck.
Shower is big enough for a chair.

Guest access
You will have access to the entire home during your stay. You will also have full access to 4 acres of land as well as a dock to float on at the waters edge.

Other things to note
PLEASE NOTE : This is a TVA (Tennessee Valley Authority) dam controlled lake. Levels fall slowly beginning in September and fully rise again in April. The lake levels are dependent on rainfall and TVA operations, (See TVA website for current levels). The summer levels stay consistently at their highest, and are easily deep enough for fishing, swimming, and docking a boat. The fall and winter lake level will create a wide, firm, sandy shoreline that's great for exploring and looking for crystals and arrowhead hunting.

Camp Fires are pending weather conditions and subject to owner approval.

listing_name: Solid Ground Lodge with Yard!
description:
Sherwood Forest Resort is a gated private community located just 1.4 miles, or 3 minutes from Light 10 on the Pigeon Forge Parkway and just 3 miles from Dollywood. It also has a large 30' x 55' community swimming pool. Solid Ground Lodge is set up for comfort and a special getaway experience, ultra comfortable leather couch and loveseat. The bed comforters are all handmade and the sheets are 500 thread count for your comfort.

The space
We are not so concerned with packing alot of people in the cabin as we are in you having a homey and special getaway vacation. Since purchasing Solid Ground we have been refurnishing and redecorating this cabin. Almost all lighting has been changed to dimmer lighting so that you can adjust the lighting to your mood. Wireless Internet. Hair dryers in both bathrooms. All the kitchen pots, pans, utensils, glassware, and about everything else you can think of, is brand new. We refinished the railings and deck, and planted new trees and shrubery. All bedrooms and living room have flat screen TV's. 32' flat screen TV's in both bedrooms with DVD players. The 42' flat screen in the living room has a surround sound system. We also have over 20 DVD's for your entertainment. The cabin is also equipped with wireless high speed internet. The phone has unlimited local and long distance calling. Cell phone reception is great, as we are high up on the mountain. The upstairs master bedroom has it's own jacuzzi tub and an electric fireplace. It also has it's own bathroom. There is also a full bath downstairs right off the kitchen and 2nd bedroom. The kitchen has all granite countertops and stainless steel appliances. The front of the cabin is all windows which provides an awesome view of the Smoky Mountains. The front deck has four rocking chairs to sit in while relaxing or cooking on the gas grill. Solid Ground has it's own private parking area that is flat and has room for 3 cars and motorcycles. The road to the cabin is very wide, paved, and not steep at all. We also have a specially built gazebo off the deck with a hot tub. It has pull down privacy shades also. There are no cabins on that side of the cabin. The cabins bedrooms are in the back, next to the mountain so they are much quieter than other cabins in the resort. We also have the only side yard area in the resort which I have used to plant my trees, shrubs, and flowers. The resort's maintenance men think I have too much time on my hands). This cabin is our special getaway place , and we hope it can be yours too. Thanks, and hope to see you soon,
Roni Heinrich/ Owner

Guest access
The entire cabin is available to guest, hot tub, Jacuzzi, gas fireplace, gas grill, large yard for kids and community pool

Other things to note
All info for WIFI and TV's are in book on coffee table for easy access.

listing_name: King w/Twin, Balcony, Pools & Free Dinner Tickets!
description:
Mountain View #3505, a luxurious one-bedroom, one-and-a-half-bath condo that would be perfect for your next vacation in the heart of Pigeon Forge. Located in the third building on the fifth floor with convenient elevator access, this beautiful condo offers the best of both worlds – proximity to all the attractions and a tranquil retreat with stunning mountain views.

The space
Nestled atop a picturesque hill, away from the hustle and bustle, Mountain View Condos truly has it all. Imagine stepping onto the balcony through double doors to breathe in the fresh air and admire the breathtaking scenery. Inside, you'll find a relaxing ambiance created by the thoughtfully chosen décor. Evenings can be cozy with the electric fireplace, perfect for enjoying a good book or a movie. The granite countertops throughout add a touch of elegance to this wonderful space.


Just across the parking lot, you'll have access to both an indoor heated pool and an outdoor pool, surrounded by lush greenery, trees, and more of those incredible mountain views. For a relaxed evening, take advantage of the charcoal grills and picnic tables available while the kids have fun in the pools.

listing_name: Southern Comfort - Your Perfect Oasis
description:
The most convenient setting, minutes from the heart of Pigeon Forge! Relax and unwind in your private hot tub, cozy up by the fire, or try your hand at some foosball. Perfect for couples wanting a romantic getaway or for family vacations. Experience it all at Southern Comfort!.

The space
Welcome to Southern Comfort! This cabin feels so quaint and cozy and features several amenities, such as a private hot tub and a community pool (open Memorial Day through Labor Day). The location is also hard to beat! It's extremely close to Pigeon Forge's parkway with many shops, restaurants, and attractions about a mile from the cabin.

There are two bedrooms and two bathrooms in the cabin, and works well for a group of friends, two couples, or small families. The master bedroom is located on the main level and features a king bed and private full bathroom. The 2nd bedroom is located on the lower level and features a king bed, foosball table, jetted tub, and private full bathroom.

All linens, including sheets and towels are provided. The kitchen is stocked with pots and pans for cooking and also features a Keurig coffee machine.

Parking is available for two vehicles. The driveway is a bit steep, as with most cabins in the area. However, a 4x4 vehicle is only needed (or recommended) during winter months.

(Please be aware that Pigeon Forge is in the mountains. You will likely encounter steep hills and/or potholes somewhere during your stay.)

Pigeon Forge and the surrounding area has a lot to offer and there is something for everyone! This cabin is conveniently located close to many different attractions.

Nearby Attractions: Main Parkway - 1 mile | Patriot Park - 2 miles | Dollywood - 5 miles | Island in Pigeon Forge - 2 miles | Titanic Museum - 3.5 miles | Gatlinburg - 9 miles | Smoky Mountains National Park - 10 miles

Nearby Conveniences: Publix Super Market - 2 miles | Kroger - 2.5 miles | Dollar Tree - 2 miles | Walmart - 5 miles

**We require guests to have positive reviews to book our property if you have taken trips using Airbnb before.**
**No Smoking**
**No Pets**
**No Parties or Events**

Guest access
While you're staying here, the cabin will be your private oasis. Make sure to enjoy the hot tub and tranquil ambience from the back porch during your stay! The front porch also features a stunning view of Pigeon Forge's ferris wheel. Or... unplug and unwind while showing off your skills with a game of foosball. Guests can also access the community pool, which is open during the summer months.

Other things to note
**We strongly encourage you to purchase trip insurance when booking (either through Airbnb or with an outside travel insurance company). We do not make exceptions to our cancellation/refund policy for any reason.**

**Please a two-night minimum stay is required for reservations including a Friday or Saturday night. We also do not accommodate check in or check out on Thanksgiving Day or Christmas Day. Other holidays, such as New Year's, Easter, Memorial Day, Independence Day, and Labor Day will incur an additional $50 fee per check in or check out day. Payment will be requested after booking and the calendar is left open so stays can be booked over the holidays, so please keep this in mind.**

**Also, please note that during fall and winter months, it is advised that you will need a 4x4 vehicle to access the cabin. Snow, ice, and other types severe weather may impact your trip. You are encouraged to purchase vacation insurance during these months to avoid any losses or inconveniences. We will notify you as soon as we can if there are safety concerns around accessing the cabin due to severe weather conditions. Additionally, the fireplace is only available for use from October 15th to March 15th.**

listing_name: Serenity in the Mountains
description:
The property has plenty of privacy located on 2 1/2 acres of land, but it's only about 4 miles (10 minutes) to the parkway in Pigeon Forge where all the shows, restaurants, etc. are located. It's also only about 30 minutes to the national park, tubing, zip lines, horseback riding, snow skiing, etc. - An EV charging station is available. There is an additional charge of $50/stay to use the station. Contact owner for further instructions.

The space
The privacy, scenery, & location make this an ideal location for a family, but it's also an ideal location for a romantic getaway. It has been used frequently for anniversaries, & honeymoons. In addition, AT LEAST 3 WEDDINGS HAVE BEEN PERFORMED IN THIS CABIN.

Guest access
The entire cabin plus the surrounding 2 1/2 acres is available for guests

Other things to note
The website title is \Serenity in the Mountains\" but the cabin name is actually \"Day Dreamer.\"

The road to the cabin is a typical mountain road which are steep
cover_photo_url:
it's not far (about 300 yards) to the top & it's paved all the way.

Access to the cabin itself is fairly easy with 1 step to the front porch
photos_count:
another step to the main part of the cabin which has everything except the loft bedroom & loft bathroom. There is 1 step down to the back porch. The view from the back porch is better in the winter when leaves are off the trees or after I have thinned the trees to improve the view.

As more & more of the mountain landscape is being littered with \"cabin subdivisions\" owned by foreign and domestic mega-real estate conglomerates which cram as many structures as they can into a minimum amount of space and fill them with the furnishings made in China
host_id:
etc.; \"Day Dreamer is a refreshing change. A unique cabin built on 2 1/2 acres of land. A cabin like you've never seen before & will never see like again.

The cabin is unique in many ways
host_name: but especially because all furnishings have been handmade to my specifications. In fact
cohost_ids:
I make a lot of the furniture myself.

I cut trees or salvage trees which would otherwise be burned
cohost_names: chipped or left to rot. I saw the logs into boards using my own sawmill. I use my own planer to plane the boards and take them to a woman who builds unfinished furniture. After she builds the furniture
superhost: I put a finish on the furniture using a secret blend of furniture oils and waxes. Only 1 man knows the formula
latitude:
but I'm not that man.

The woman is Martha Pointer builds the funiture has a small furniture shop beside her house in Ashland
longitude:
AL. Martha took over the shop when her husband Roy died and she uses part of the money to fund her mission trips to Peru and other countries.

The Red Cedar dining set & chair swing were made by my friend in Northport
guests:
AL. He & I ran track together in high school (I graduated in 1965).

The birch lamp in the living area was made by a man who had a store about 5 miles down the road & the Red Cedar lamp upstairs was made by his wife. They are now divorced & no longer own the store.

The smaller Smoky Mountain quilt was custom made to my specifications by \"Quilting Granny\" (Sabrina Gray) who was at the end of Roaring Forks Motor Trail in Gatlingburg. She was 80 years old & in a wheelchair. She was also a story-teller
bedrooms: artist
beds:
& made herbal products.

The other 2 bear quilts were made by Kim Beecher. A retired Air Force Lt. Col. who lives near me in Prattville
baths:
AL

The kitchen counter & other things in the cabin were made by our friend & maintenance man Lee Stephens who lives near the cabin.

Some of the lamp shades & blankets are copies of paintings from the Hautman Brothers who have paintings in Smithsonian and in the White House.

These are a few reasons why you've never seen anything like our cabin before & will never see anything like it ever again!!!"

listing_name: The Cove - Unit 1302 - Mountain View Condos
description:
- FREE Attraction Ticket with EACH night Stay Including Dollywood

The space
Experience the perfect mountain getaway at this amazing condo, where you wake up to stunning mountain views every morning. Picture yourself grilling outdoors in the beautiful green area after a fun day of hiking. If this sounds like your ideal vacation in Pigeon Forge, then welcome to your relaxing spot! With two big bedrooms, it's perfect for up to six guests, making sure everyone has an amazing time!

This unit has:
* King-sized bed in the master bedroom
* Queen-sized bed in the second bedroom
* Queen air mattress in the den

Each bedroom is equipped with a TV and a ceiling fan, ensuring comfort and entertainment. The living area hosts a generous flat screen TV, positioned in front of ample seating for your family. With two full bathrooms, including a master with a garden tub and shower, you'll find comfort and convenience.

Experience the convenience of upgraded WiFi services, enhancing your connectivity and enjoyment throughout your stay in our units. Stay effortlessly connected and entertained with our high-speed internet access.

The outdoor pool boasts a playful mushroom water feature, perfect for the enjoyment of children or even yourself, and is heated typically in April and May, depending on the outside temperature. The indoor pool maintains an inviting temperature and is heated year-round. Our resort presents an abundance of space, featuring several gathering and picnic areas, along with outdoor grills. A highlight is our newest amenity – a quarter-mile walking trail on our expansive five-acre green space. The grounds further showcase a variety of outdoor activities, such as tetherball, a volleyball court, horseshoes, two playgrounds, a basketball court, and shuffleboard. The sprawling area ensures an enjoyable experience for both you and your children! All buildings at our resort feature elevators for accessibility. Units are wheelchair accessible. Each unit offers free parking for your car.

The fully stocked kitchen encompasses a refrigerator/freezer, dishwasher, microwave, and stove/oven. We supply dishes, glassware, pot and pan sets, a toaster, a blender, and a coffee maker. For specialized items such as a wok, rice steamer, or crockpot, we recommend bringing your own, as these are not provided. Enjoy complimentary amenities, including free Wi-Fi, cable TV in the rooms, and local phone service. Sheets and towel sets are provided for your stay, though they cannot be changed out. A full washer and dryer are also available in this unit. While we provide a single-use box of detergent, you may wish to bring extra if you plan to do laundry. An iron and ironing board are included. This resort is pet-free, smoke-free, and strictly prohibits trailers.

As a token of our appreciation for choosing Hazelrig Enterprises, you'll receive one free admission daily to popular attractions, including Dollywood, Hatfield & McCoy Feud and Dinner Show, and The Pirate Show Dinner Show. No timeshare presentations or mandatory purchases are involved in this program. A stay with us entitles you to 1 ticket choice per day of stay from an activities package totaling $1,059 with our partner Xplorie.

Conveniently positioned on Plaza Drive between traffic lights 0 and 1, directly behind Country Tonight in the entertainment district, our resort provides easy access to a trolley stop at the main road, offering rides throughout Pigeon Forge for a nominal fee of $.50. Dollywood, softball fields, and The Island, featuring Margaritaville and Paula Deen's, are approximately 2 miles away.

Please note that trailer or car hauler parking is strictly prohibited, and alternative arrangements can be coordinated through property management.

Check-in is hassle-free – simply show up after the designated time and enter the provided code to unlock the door. This unit is located in Building 1 on the 3rd floor, offering spectacular views. Public parking and a trolley stop at the bottom of the hill facilitate easy access to various attractions in Pigeon Forge for a nominal fee of $.50. Embark on your extraordinary vacation with us!

Guest access
All guests of the resort have FREE access to all these amenities which are ONLY found at our resort. We strive to make your stay one to remember!

Unwind in the hot tub under the stars or enjoy the large deck with its built-in bar and seating.

The space
If your dates are already booked, please click our profile picture or visit our other cabin, Creekside:
https://www.airbnb.com/rooms/19013904

The Setting & Location
The Treehouse is nestled within a beautiful 25-acre park-like estate perfectly positioned between Gatlinburg and Pigeon Forge. You are within 10 miles of nearly everything while enjoying a private, serene woodland experience.

Pet-Friendly Getaway

We are happy to welcome your well-behaved pets to join you in the forest!

The Journey Down

To reach this secluded sanctuary, there are 26 steps and landings leading down from the parking area to the cabin. This descent into the forest canopy ensures total privacy and an authentic, tucked-away woodland experience.
Our Cleanliness Standards

Personally Prepared: We personally clean and prepare our cabins to ensure they are immaculate.

Fresh Water: We drain, sanitize, and refill the hot tub for every reservation—ensuring a sparkling clean experience.

No Cleaning Fee: We do not charge a general cleaning fee. In exchange, we ask that guests leave the cabin in the same clean condition they found it (details in House Rules).

Amenities

Bedroom: Cozy Scandinavian built-in King bed with a dedicated LCD TV and Blu-Ray.

Outdoor Living: Multi-level decks with a built-in bar, hot tub under the stars, and a charcoal grill near the parking area (BYO charcoal).

Kitchen: Fully equipped with a dishwasher, Keurig, drip coffee maker, and all cookware.

Comfort: WiFi, Smart tv's, electric fireplace, and dimmable lighting.

Guest Rules

2 Adults Max: Strictly no children or infants permitted.

Pets: Well-behaved pets welcome with a nightly fee. Please include them in your reservation.

Accessibility: Please consider the 26 steps/landings; the descent and ascent may not be suitable for those with limited mobility.

Check-out: Please follow House Rules to maintain our \No Cleaning Fee\" policy .

Guest access
Entire Cabin is yours

Ideal Location!

listing_name: Butterfly Barn in the Smoky Mountains
description:
Discover our charming one-room studio apartment, perfect for couples or a small family! This cozy space features a comfortable bed, kitchenette, and a private bathroom. Enjoy free WiFi, a smart TV, and stylish décor designed for relaxation. Conveniently located near top attractions, restaurants, and the National Park, it's the ideal base for your trip. Whether for work or leisure, our studio offers comfort and convenience. Chickens live on property, fresh eggs usually available upon request.

The space
The Butterfly Barn – A Cozy Retreat in a Park-Like Setting
Welcome to The Butterfly Barn, a charming 450-square-foot studio-style retreat located above a detached garage. Nestled in a serene, park-like setting with a playground, a peaceful stream, and lush butterfly gardens, this space is perfect for families with young children or couples looking for a tranquil escape.

Inside The Butterfly Barn
This open-concept space features:

A queen bed in the sleeping area
A sleeper sofa in the living area (with linens provided for extra guests)
Two comfortable barrel chairs for lounging
A dining table with seating for four
A private bathroom with a shower-tub combo (towels provided)
Kitchen Details
The kitchen is designed for light cooking only and includes:

A mini fridge
A microwave
A toaster
A coffee maker
Basic dishware and utensils
(Please note: There is no stove or oven.)

🚫 Important House Rule – No Pets Allowed!
We adore animals, but The Butterfly Barn is strictly pet-free—not even our own pets are allowed inside! Since we live on the property, sneaking in a pet unnoticed is unlikely. If this rule is violated, a $100 pet cleaning fee will be charged, and your booking may be canceled. Please respect this policy.

We can’t wait to host you in this peaceful retreat!

Guest access
Parking for no more than two vehicles, directly in front of barn house garage door . Guests have full access to the studio and the playground area.

Other things to note
~Kitchenette includes apt. size fridge/freezer; microwave; toaster oven; hot plate/single burner; griddle; K-cup type coffee maker; French Press; toaster; and all standard kitchen ware (except stove/oven). If you are planning a longer stay and cooking a lot, the Butterfly Barn may not be the Airbnb for you, as the kitchen is only an efficiency kitchen and not really equipped for heavy cooking!

~The bathroom door is a sliding barn door and does not have a lock. If this could potentially be an issue for you, please look for different accommodations.

~We do NOT offer access to a washer or dryer but we are a short drive 4.3 miles to the nearest laundry mat.

~Our small dogs live on the property in main house with us. Pinky and Astrid may have fierce barks but, rest assured they will be escorted while outside during your stay. Butterfly Barn is it's own dwelling separate from main house above our detached garage the dogs are kept in main house and the only time you may see them is when we take them out. We do not allow our dogs to go into the Butterfly Barn at any time.

~Must be able to climb stairs.

~We have chickens! Please inquire about fresh eggs, we love to share! Cold weather does affect egg production, but if the girls are laying we are sharing! Please do not enter the chicken coop! We have multiple roosters, and they can be aggressive! Please view from outside the run and coop! They love treats, tomatoes, oatmeal, bird seed ( bread is actually bad for birds! It can block their crop, please no bread!)


Chickens and Turkey's free range! All the hens are friendly and for the most part the roosters are to, but I recommend giving the roosters their space. The hens may come up to you they are very social. The Turkey's are very social and will come up to you and maybe follow you around, please don't be afraid of them, the Turkey's are extremely sweet and only want your attention!

listing_name: Unit 3606 - Mountain View Condos
description:
- FREE Attraction Ticket with EACH night Stay Including Dollywood

The space
Experience the premier condo for your Pigeon Forge getaway – a unit offering stunning views! Indulge in relaxation with pool afternoons or fun in the mushroom water feature. Engage in friendly volleyball matches with loved ones, then enjoy a grill-out on our vast green space. Our goal is to offer an inviting space at a great price, fostering cherished memories with your loved ones and inviting you back again and again. With two generous bedrooms, it easily hosts up to six guests, ensuring everyone has an incredible time.

This unit has:
* King-sized bed in the master bedroom
* Queen-sized bed in the second bedroom
* Queen air mattress in the den

The bedrooms are equipped with a TV and a ceiling fan, ensuring comfort and entertainment. The living area hosts a generous flat screen TV, positioned in front of ample seating for your family. With two full bathrooms, including a master bathroom with a garden tub and shower, you'll find comfort and convenience.

Experience the convenience of upgraded WiFi services, enhancing your connectivity and enjoyment throughout your stay in our units. Stay effortlessly connected and entertained with our high-speed internet access.

The outdoor pool boasts a playful mushroom water feature, perfect for the enjoyment of children or even yourself, and is heated typically in April and May, depending on the outside temperature. The indoor pool maintains an inviting temperature and is heated year-round. Our resort presents an abundance of space, featuring several gathering and picnic areas, along with outdoor grills. A highlight is our newest amenity – a quarter-mile walking trail on our expansive five-acre green space. The grounds further showcase a variety of outdoor activities, such as tetherball, a volleyball court, horseshoes, two playgrounds, a basketball court, and shuffleboard. The sprawling area ensures an enjoyable experience for both you and your children! All buildings at our resort feature elevators for accessibility. Units are wheelchair accessible. Each unit offers free parking for your car.

The fully stocked kitchen encompasses a refrigerator/freezer, dishwasher, microwave, and stove/oven. We supply dishes, glassware, pot and pan sets, a toaster, a blender, and a coffee maker. For specialized items such as a wok, rice steamer, or crockpot, we recommend bringing your own, as these are not provided. Enjoy complimentary amenities, including free Wi-Fi, cable TV in the rooms, and local phone service. Sheets and towel sets are provided for your stay, though they cannot be changed out. A full washer and dryer are also available in this unit. While we provide a single-use box of detergent, you may wish to bring extra if you plan to do laundry. An iron and ironing board are included. This resort is pet-free, smoke-free, and strictly prohibits trailers.

As a token of our appreciation for choosing Hazelrig Enterprises, you'll receive one free admission daily to popular attractions, including Dollywood, Hatfield & McCoy Feud and Dinner Show, and The Pirate Show Dinner Show. No timeshare presentations or mandatory purchases are involved in this program. A stay with us entitles you to 1 ticket choice per day of stay from an activities package totaling $1,059 with our partner Xplorie.

Conveniently positioned on Plaza Drive between traffic lights 0 and 1, directly behind Country Tonight in the entertainment district, our resort provides easy access to a trolley stop at the main road, offering rides throughout Pigeon Forge for a nominal fee of $.50. Dollywood, softball fields, and The Island, featuring Margaritaville and Paula Deen's, are approximately 2 miles away.

Please note that trailer or car hauler parking is strictly prohibited, and alternative arrangements can be coordinated through property management.

Check-in is hassle-free – simply show up after the designated time and enter the provided code to unlock the door. This unit is located in Building 3 on the 6th floor, offering spectacular views. Public parking and a trolley stop at the bottom of the hill facilitate easy access to various attractions in Pigeon Forge for a nominal fee of $.50. Embark on your extraordinary vacation with us!

Guest access
All guests of the resort have FREE access to all these amenities which are ONLY found at our resort. We strive to make your stay one to remember!

Located in Eagles Ridge Resort just minutes to the Parkway, Dollywood, and Gatlinburg, this 2BR/2BA log cabin offers easy access with a peaceful wooded setting. Walk to the seasonal pool and enjoy a private hot tub, soaking tub, 2 gas fireplaces, and 2 king suites. Covered deck with rockers, swing, and dining area. Pet-friendly, WiFi included—perfect for couples or small families looking to relax close to everything.

The space
Location & Resort Highlights
Located in the highly desirable Eagles Ridge Resort, Sleepy Bear offers the perfect Smoky Mountain setting—peaceful, wooded, and just minutes to the Pigeon Forge Parkway, Dollywood, Gatlinburg, and the Great Smoky Mountains National Park. This established resort is known for easy access (no steep roads), strong guest demand, and repeat visitors. Guests can also walk to the seasonal resort pool, adding to the convenience and appeal.

Living Area
The main level features a warm, inviting living space with vaulted ceilings, comfortable seating, and a gas fireplace—perfect for relaxing after a day out. A queen sleeper sofa provides additional sleeping, and large windows bring in natural light and wooded views.

Kitchen & Dining
The fully equipped kitchen offers everything needed for meals in, with bar seating for 2 and a dining table for 6. Easy flow between kitchen and living areas makes it ideal for gathering.

Bedrooms & Bathrooms
• Main Level: King bedroom with private bath (stand-up shower)
• Upper Level: King suite with gas fireplace, seating area, and private bath (stand-up shower) + soaking tub
• Queen sleeper sofa in living area for additional guests

Outdoor Living
Covered, partial wraparound deck designed for relaxation and enjoying the natural setting:
• Wooden rockers + porch swing
• Screened-in area with hot tub and privacy louvers
• Outdoor dining space + gas grill

What Guests Love About This Space
• 📍 Minutes to Parkway, Dollywood & Gatlinburg
• 🌲 Peaceful wooded setting with seasonal mountain views
• 🚶 Walkable to seasonal resort pool
• 🔥 Two gas fireplaces for year-round comfort
• 🛁 Soaking tub + private hot tub
• 🛏️ 2 King Suites + sleeper sofa
• 🚗 Easy access roads (no steep drives)
• 🐾 Pet-friendly (fee applies)
• 📶 Free WiFi
​​​​​​​
ER239 Sleepy Bear delivers a well-rounded Smoky Mountain experience—prime location, comfortable layout, and the setting guests come back for.

Guest access
Enjoy easy self-check-in with a personalized entry code sent when property is ready for check-in. For those who prefer in-person assistance, optional check-in is available at our reservations office during office hours.

Other things to note
Wildlife sightings are possible. Please do not feed the bears 🐻. Resort's outdoor pool is seasonal. Hot tubs are drained, cleaned, and serviced regularly; however, leaves, pollen, or debris may be present due to the mountain setting. WiFi is provided, but speeds and connectivity may vary due to weather, terrain, or service provider outages. This is a mountain environment - seasonal insects, including Asian lady beetles, may be present, especially during certain times of year, despite regular professional pest control.

The Master bedroom is located on this level and offers a luxurious King bed, TV, bedside Jacuzzi, ceiling fan, and carpeting. A full bathroom with tile flooring that can be accessed from the hall and bedroom is found along with a stacked washer/dryer for guest convenience.

On to the upstairs lofted area where you will find a full size bunk bed and sitting room area that offers a Queen sleeper sofa, easy chair, Air Hockey Table, TV, DVD Player, ceiling fan, wood flooring, and a private covered balcony.

There is a full bathroom with tile flooring on this level as well.

For those guests looking to enjoy nature at its finest, you will find partially covered wraparound main level deck that offers a gas grill, patio set for 4, 11 rockers, a wooden swing, and an Adirondack Chair. There is even a nice sitting area with 2 more Adirondack Chairs in the small yard area. The covered lower level deck houses the hot tub and 2 wooden glider rockers.
