ERN819 | Mountain Majesty
5 Bedrooms | 5 Bathrooms | Sleeps Up to 13 | Near Pigeon Forge
Welcome to Mountain Majesty, a stunning three-level log cabin designed for space, comfort, and unforgettable Smoky Mountain memories. Located just 2 miles from Pigeon Forge, this beautifully appointed retreat is tucked away in a peaceful wooded setting, offering the perfect balance of convenience and serenity. Ideal for families, church groups, ladies’ retreats, and sports teams, this cabin provides plenty of room to relax, reconnect, and entertain.
Cabin Highlights
Three spacious levels
5 bedrooms & 5 bathrooms
Theater room & game room
Large decks with hot tub
Peaceful wooded views
Close to attractions, dining, and shopping
Main Level – Gathering & Comfort
The main level welcomes you with an open-concept living space featuring a cozy living room, two queen futon sofas, and a large-screen TV—perfect for movie nights or group gatherings.
The fully equipped kitchen offers generous counter space and all the essentials for preparing meals at home. With dining and kitchen seating for up to 13 guests, everyone can comfortably gather together.
Also on the main level:
Two king bedrooms
Two full bathrooms
Convenient access to the deck and outdoor seating
Top Level – Private Master Retreat
The entire top floor is dedicated to the luxurious master suite, offering a true retreat experience. This spacious suite includes:
King bed
Private ensuite bathroom
In-room Jacuzzi tub for ultimate relaxation
Peaceful setting for rest and rejuvenation
Lower Level – Entertainment Central
The lower level is all about fun and relaxation. Guests will enjoy:
A dedicated theater room with a large screen and comfortable seating
Game room for friendly competition
Two additional king bedrooms
Full bathroom
Sleeper sofa located in the theater area for additional sleeping space
Outdoor Living
Step outside onto the expansive decks and take in the tranquil wooded views. This outdoor space is perfect for unwinding after a day of adventure and includes:
Plenty of seating
Private hot tub
Peaceful natural surroundings
Sleeping Arrangements

Main Level:

Lower Level:

Perfect for Any Group Getaway
Whether you’re planning a family vacation, group retreat, or Smoky Mountain escape, Mountain Majesty offers the space, amenities, and location to make your stay truly memorable.
Book your stay today and experience comfort, entertainment, and mountain charm all in one exceptional cabin.

On to the lower level, you will find a spacious bedroom with a Queen bed, Queen Sleeper Sofa, TV, easy chair, Wet Bar, Mini Fridge, and wood flooring. Guests will find another bedroom offering a Queen bed, TV, easy chair, ceiling fan, and wood flooring. There is a stacked washer/dryer in one of the bedroom closets for your convenience along with an iron and ironing board. A full bathroom with a tub/shower combination and tile flooring is located on this level as well.

For guests to enjoy the sounds of nature, there is a covered front main level deck with 2 wooden rockers and a wooden swing. The Sugar Bear Mountain Hideaway cabin in Pigeon Forge, Tennessee is a cozy retreat that can accommodate up to 8 guests, making it perfect for family vacations or group getaways.

The space
Escape to Sugar Bear Mountain Hideaway in Pigeon Forge, Tennessee! This cozy retreat comfortably accommodates up to eight guests, perfect for family vacations or group getaways. Unwind amidst the serene mountain surroundings while staying connected with complimentary WiFi. Imagine evenings spent by the fireplace, sharing stories and creating lasting memories. The game room offers a fun escape for all ages. With its rustic charm, comfortable furnishings, and thoughtful amenities, this cabin offers a truly relaxing and rejuvenating experience.

Living Room:

Step into the living room and feel the cozy embrace of this inviting space. Sink into the plush queen-sized sleeper sofa and catch up on your favorite shows on the flat-screen TV. As the evening chill sets in, the gas fireplace crackles to life, casting a warm, inviting glow. The comfortable loveseat beckons with a good book and a cup of hot cocoa. This is the perfect haven for unwinding and making cherished memories with loved ones.


Kitchen/ Dining Room:

Whip up culinary delights in this cabin's fully equipped kitchen, complete with an electric range, refrigerator, microwave, dishwasher, and coffee maker. Ample counter space and storage make cooking a joy. Gather around the spacious dining table, which comfortably seats six, for memorable meals with family and friends. The soft lighting creates a warm and inviting ambiance for everything from casual breakfasts to romantic dinners. Dish towels, dish starter soap, and dishwasher starter soap are provided.


Game Room:

The sounds of laughter and friendly competition fill the upper loft game room, a haven for fun and entertainment. Challenge your family to a game of air hockey, test your skills at the arcade game, or gather around a board game for an evening of laughter and connection. A classic checkers set is also available for a more relaxed game of strategy.

description:
Feels like rustic mtn-top cabin in the woods convenient, private, great porch views; indoor heated pool; Condo is top 2 floors of 3 story bldg(no elevator); fully furnished kitchen/bed/bath; 5th & 6th guest$75 extra; indoor pool; 5 min-Dollywood, Ripkin, groceries, Old Mill, The Island, dining, shops; 15 min-outlet malls, Gatlinburg; 20 min-caves, trout ponds, Smoky Mtn Natl Park hiking/sights; 40 min-zip line, white water rafting; gas fireplace in winter; addl. condos in bldg for larger group

The space
Your home will be a two story, spacious, nearly 1700 square foot condo with cabin- In-the-woods feel complete with a view and LOCATION, LOCATION, LOCATION !

The condo is the 2nd and 3rd floors of a 3 story building. There is no elevator. The front door, kitchen, 1/2 bath and living areas are on the 2nd floor. The 2 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms are on the 3rd floor in king and queen beds.

Nightly cost stated is for 4 people upstairs. If you want to use the sleeper sofa downstairs there is a $75 extra charge for extra linens. Let me know ahead of time so they can be supplied.

Condo is very roomy, cozy and comfortable -- Wifi, Bluetooth, TV's in living room and bedrooms and much more. The large mountain top covered porches have amazing views of the valley below and mountains in distance. You will be in the middle of the action; but above all the noise and congestion, in your mountain-top peace and quiet. About all you will hear are birds and occasionally the Dollywood train whistle and riders on the roller coaster.

Kitchen, bedroom & bath are fully furnished - just bring your clothes, food & toiletries.

Guest access
You will have private use of the entire condo including 4 porches. You will also have use of gas grill and picnic table.

Other things to note
Self check in is by door lock keypad anytime 4pm or after.
This condo that feels like an isolated mountaintop cabin in the woods is very unique in that it is so private yet close and convenient to everything. There is a computer desk/work space in the main living area if you need it. The condo is the 2nd and 3rd floors of a 3 story building. There is no elevator. The front door, kitchen, 1/2 bath and living areas are on the 2nd floor. The bedrooms and 2 bedrooms are on the 3rd floor.

listing_name: 3BR Luxury Cabin w/ Hot Tub – 5 min to Dollywood
description:
Escape to this 3-bedroom, 3-bath resort cabin for 10, just 5 minutes from Dollywood, Splash Country, and Tanger Outlets. Relax in your private hot tub, enjoy two living rooms, or take in mountain views from the sunroom or balcony. Indoor/outdoor pools, fireplaces, and resort amenities make this luxury cabin perfect for families, couples, or groups seeking adventure and relaxation in the Smoky Mountains.

The space
Luxury 3BR Smoky Mountain Cabin – 5 min to Dollywood

Escape to the Smoky Mountains at this 3-bedroom, 3-bath cabin for 10. Enjoy breathtaking mountain views, a private hot tub, and access to indoor/outdoor resort pools. Just 5 minutes from Dollywood, Splash Country, and Tanger Outlets, this cabin offers the perfect mix of adventure and relaxation for families, couples, or groups.

THE EXPERIENCE
Step inside and enjoy a modern, cozy interior with open living spaces. The top floor features a private master suite with its own balcony and sitting area. Cook a delicious breakfast in the fully equipped kitchen or downstairs kitchenette, then enjoy it in the sunroom with panoramic mountain views. Curl up by one of the two gas fireplaces, play games, or watch your favorite shows on one of four 55-inch TVs.

Relax on the back porch overlooking the mountains and Dollywood. After a day of adventure, take a dip in the indoor or outdoor pools, soak in your private hot tub, or enjoy resort amenities like the sauna.

THE LOCATION
Minutes from Dollywood, Splash Country, Gatlinburg Golf Course, and Tanger Outlets, this cabin puts you close to the best attractions Pigeon Forge has to offer. Hiking, shopping, and dining are all nearby, and the Great Smoky Mountains National Park is just a short drive away.

AMENITIES & HIGHLIGHTS
• Part of a duplex cabin — you have full privacy in your side
• Adjacent cabin available for larger groups (rent both sides for up to 20 guests)
• Private hot tub
• Indoor & outdoor resort pools
• Sauna
• Two cozy living rooms with gas fireplaces
• Fully equipped kitchen + downstairs kitchenette
• 5 flat-screen TVs
• Sunroom & back porch with mountain views
• Sleeps 10 comfortably (3 bedrooms + 1 queen pullout)

SLEEPING ARRANGEMENTS
• Master (top floor): Queen + private balcony and sitting area
• Bedroom 2: King
• Bedroom 3: Queen over Queen Bunk Bed
• Additional sleeping: Queen pullout bed in living room

HOUSE RULES / POLICIES
• All guests must complete Airbnb’s ID verification process. By booking, guests agree to our house rules and property policies. Full rental agreement & welcome guide provided after booking.
• No smoking, no pets, no parties/events
• Minimum age to book: 25
• Additional fees and taxes may apply

listing_name: Bear Ridge - Breathtaking views with a cozy feel
description:
Bear Ridge is a spacious, open area, 4 bedroom cabin located near the top of Pine Mountain in a private mountain setting that is only 2 miles from the middle of the parkway in Pigeon Forge. There are two king suites and two queen suites, with the queen suites being handicap accessible. The kitchen is fully equipped to allow preparation of meals and a charcoal grill is provided for outdoor cooking. There is a large hot tub on the deck and a two person indoor sauna.

The views are incredible!

The space
The house offers large screen TVs in the den and game room, a wet bar, and a pool table for entertainment. Wi-Fi is available.

Bear Ridge is handicap accessible. There is a ramp on the back side of the house and 2 bedrooms on the main level for use by guests who have difficulty getting around. The kitchen and den are also on the main level.

Unlike many cabins in communities, there is plenty of parking and space to turn around.

Come stay to experience a relaxing time away from it all, with the flexibility to shop, eat out, and experience all that Pigeon Forge and Gatlinburg have to offer!

Guest access
This is private house on a one acre lot that is fully usable by renters.

listing_name: Beautiful  Mountain View! Cozy cabin!
description:
This mountain cabin, a jewel in nature's crown, invites you to a vista where seasons paint the sky.
But be warned, the journey up is a true test of ascent, with a driveway as steep as 26%, challenging even the bravest of hearts.
Yet, at the base, a haven for the hesitant offers parking for those who dare not climb
Rest assured, our watchful cameras, guardians of your peace, are placed not to intrude but to ensure your safety and respect of your privacy. Pets w/pet fee non refundable 50.00

The space
Discover the romance of Sevierville, TN's Sky Harbor community. Nestled among the majestic Smoky Mountains, this cabin offers an intimate escape with sweeping views that stretch across the rugged peaks and lush valleys. Enjoy the use of a private hot tub under the stars, sleep soundly in a cozy queen-size bed, or relax on a versatile futon. Perfect for couples seeking tranquility and natural beauty, this retreat promises serene moments and unforgettable memories. Feel free to reach out with any questions to plan your mountain getaway! We do allow pet with non refundable 50.00pet fee per pet

Guest access
Welcome to your mountain retreat! As an owner-operated cabin, you'll receive a unique code for the keypad. Check-in begins at 4 PM, allowing you time to settle in and start your adventure. Check-out is at 11 AM, giving you a morning to reminisce before departure. Enjoy the ease and security of your stay!

Other things to note
- **Location:** The cabin is situated on a one-lane mountain road with a steep driveway.
- **Security:** There is one camera on the property, focused on the driveway.
- **Age Restriction:** All guests must be 18 or older unless accompanied by a guardian.
- **Pet Policy:** No pets are generally allowed, but exceptions can be made with a non-refundable pet deposit.
- **Check-in/Check-out:** No early check-ins or late check-outs are offered.
- **Environment:** The cabin is in a wooded area where wildlife might be visible and audible.
- **Amenities:**
- One roll of toilet paper provided.
- Two cups of coffee available.
- One trash bag provided.
- **Utilities:** The cabin uses a septic system; guests should be mindful of only flushing TP to avoid issues with the septic tank.

Please ensure to bring any additional supplies you might need since the cabin's provisions are limited.

description:
* newly updated!!!!! Welcome to Creekside cabin in Pigeon Forge!! Just a 5 min drive to Gatlinburg! No steep twisting mountain roads to navigate to get to this little piece of heaven!! The space
we are pet friendly though there is a 150.00 pet fee per stay. up to 2 dogs. must be up to date on shots and on preventitive flea/tick meds. crated if left alone. there will be an extra cleaning charge if pets are allowed on furniture

Other things to note
no refunds for inclement weather/acts of nature. if traveling in snow season or any other season where severe weather could happen we advise purchasing travel insurance


we do NOT accept check in or check out on major holidays. These days are set aside for family time.

listing_name: SelfCheckIn/RusticModern cottage/hot-tub/ShadyCove
description:
Location Location Location! This is an amazing cabin in the heart of pigeon forge! Close to Dollywood and 2 minutes to all the action on the strip. The cabin is great for a couples get away or small family on vacation. After long days in the town enjoy some relaxing time at the cabin enjoying the community pool or a soak in the hot tub on the back deck surrounded by trees. Make it a movie night and enjoy the 60\ 4K ultra flat screen TV in the living room or the 50” flat screen TV in the BR

The space
This cabin is very convenient to Dollywood and pigeon forge. It has a secluded feel but not far off of the main roads. You will instantly feel right at home with a warm and cozy feeling. Bring your K-cups to enjoy a nice cup of coffee from the Keurig coffee maker. Easy and convenient for motorcycles.

Guest access
Guest have access to the entire cabin. The small community the cabin is located in has a nice outdoor pool for cooling off on the those warm summer days.

Other things to note
Must be 21 and older to book.


We suggest travel insurance for all bookings Incase of any unpredictable circumstances being able to make the trip."

listing_name: The Great Outdoors
description:
Welcome to, The Great Outdoors!

WOW, Mt LeConte view. Our cabin has two king bedrooms one up and one down. A queen sleeper sofa in the living area with grand floor to ceiling stone fireplace and dinning table for seating six adults comfortably. The spacious kitchen has all amenities needed for cooking. An additional fireplace is located in the upstairs bedroom with a romantic jetted tub. The cabin offers unobstructed views, relaxing hot tub, pool table, WiFi, cable and 3 flat screen TV's.

The space
This cabin has it ALL! Great location, gorgeous mountain views, Wi-fi, phenomenally spacious rooms with king beds and extra queen sofa sleeper, not to mention all the conveniences of home.
The kitchen has full sized stainless appliances with dishwasher, toaster, coffee maker, K-cup brewer, pots, pans, and silverware for 6.
The use of a washing machine and dryer as well as iron with ironing board. Linens are provided with enough wash cloths and towels.
All at a cost that leaves money to spend on the things you enjoy!

Guest access
Guests have access to the entire home, minus the owners storage, to enjoy a game of pool in the loft, a soak in the hot tub, reading by the fireplace, sports and movies on the flat screens or relaxing in the rocking chairs. All of this with a FREE mountain view and whole house WiFi!!

Other things to note
All listed rates do not include 3 % local city and county tax. The state tax of 9.75% and 130 dollar cleaning fee will show up on guests itemized breakdown.

Sadly, for those of us that love our pets, the cabin is NOT pet friendly.

listing_name: Beaver's Treehouse - Private Pool and Sauna!
description:
Take in spectacular Smoky Mountain views from the decks, hot tub, and pool room of Beaver’s Treehouse. Located just 5 miles from downtown Pigeon Forge, this amenity-loaded escape offers a private indoor pool, sauna, home theater, game loft, and cozy living spaces for a memorable group getaway.

The space
Living Room
Natural light pours in through large windows in the open-concept living area, creating a warm and welcoming space for relaxing. Share stories by the fire, gather for game night, or unwind with your favorite show on the big screen. The inviting layout is perfect for spending time with your group.
• Gas fireplace with big screen TV above
• Leather sofa and plush chairs
• High ceilings and mountain views
• Side tables and reading lamps
• Open flow into the kitchen and dining area

Kitchen
Cooking is a breeze in the well-equipped kitchen featuring granite countertops and stainless appliances. The wraparound design offers plenty of space to prepare meals and snacks while staying connected to the rest of the group. It’s both functional and stylish for group dining.
• Full-size refrigerator, stove, oven, microwave, dishwasher
• Blender, coffeemaker, and knife set
• Plates, glasses, utensils, and cookware
• Dark cabinetry and tiled floors
• Open to dining area for easy serving

Dining Area
Just off the kitchen, the dining space is ideal for shared meals, puzzles, or games after dinner. Surrounded by windows, this area invites conversation and connection. Host a cozy dinner or serve up a buffet on the long wooden table.
• Seats up to 8 guests
• Table doubles as game or craft space
• Natural light and scenic views
• Conveniently located near kitchen
• Great for group meals or casual snacking

Private Indoor Pool + Sauna
Swim year-round in your own private indoor pool, no matter the weather outside. A wall of windows brings in the views, and there’s seating to relax after your swim. A private sauna adds a spa-like experience for even more relaxation.
• Indoor pool (10x18 feet, 3.5–5.5 feet deep)
• Kept at 87 degrees year-round
• Poolside chairs for lounging
• Large windows with mountain views
• Private sauna for warm, steamy soaks

Theater Room
Watch your favorite movies without ever leaving the cabin. The private, windowless theater room offers a true cinematic experience. Everyone will enjoy kicking back after a day exploring Pigeon Forge.
• 98-inch big screen TV & surround sound
• Theater-style seats with cupholders & a sofa
• Classic movie posters for inspiration
• Cozy, quiet space for immersive viewing

Game Loft
Challenge friends and family to friendly matches upstairs in the rec loft. Arcade games and a pool table provide endless fun, while natural light and open space make it a comfortable hangout zone.
• Pool table for casual games
• Multicade arcade unit
• Seating and open design
• Great for kids and adults alike
• Bright and airy with high ceilings

Bedrooms
After a long day of sightseeing, retreat to cozy bedrooms that offer comfort and convenience. Each has its own TV and thoughtful touches to make you feel at home. There’s plenty of space for a large group.
• 2 king beds, 2 full-over-full bunks, 1 sleeper sofa
• Private TVs in all bedrooms
• Ceiling fans and reading lamps
• Dressers and closets for unpacking
• Each bedroom has its own bathroom

Outdoor Spaces
Breathe in crisp mountain air and soak in the hot tub as you enjoy the views. The spacious decks offer a peaceful setting for sipping coffee or grilling out with family. Take advantage of the location to fully embrace outdoor living.
• Rocking chairs on covered deck
• Mountain views throughout
• Charcoal, picnic-style grill for cookouts
• Private hot tub on the deck
• Community outdoor pool and hot tub access

Additional Amenities
Your stay comes with everything you need for a convenient and comfortable getaway. From entertainment to practical perks, this cabin is set up to make travel easy.
• Free Wi-Fi and keyless entry
• Washer and dryer
• Motorcycle-friendly
• Located in Sherwood Forest Resort
• Access to community pool (managed by third party; not guaranteed)

Nearby Attractions
Explore the best of Pigeon Forge and beyond from this central location.
• Dolly Parton's Stampede – 4.6 miles

• Pigeon Forge Factory Outlet Mall – 5.5 miles
• The Island in Pigeon Forge – 6.1 miles
• Dollywood – 7.7 miles

Other things to note
Just a little tip: Google Maps and other navigation systems have been known to lead guests astray! You can use your favorite navigation tool to reach the Parkway, but please use the written directions once you arrive in town. When you turn onto the Parkway/US 441, you'll notice that the traffic lights have numbers next to the street signs. No need to count!

listing_name: Luxury Lodge - Private Pool, Views, Games + More!
description:
Enjoy the best of mountain living at Luxury Lodge! This gorgeous group cabin in The Village at Sherwood Forest boasts luxury all throughout, making you feel like you're in your own private lodge. Host a special occasion, a family reunion, or a great group getaway at this 12-bedroom, 12 (and 2 half)-bathroom lodge in Pigeon Forge!

The space
The fully equipped kitchen has double appliances, and the dining area has plenty of room to seat a group. Bedding is a nice mix for a group, with 10 king beds, bunk beds, and futons throughout the cabin. It will be easy to keep groups entertained, too, with a private home theater great for movie nights. Or you can host a game tournament upstairs in the rec room, with a poker table, arcade games, and a wet bar! Year-round, have fun in the cabin's private indoor pool! And at night, let guests climb into the bubbling outdoor hot tub to unwind.

When you're not hanging out in this gorgeous lodge, enjoy an easy drive to downtown Pigeon Forge - less than 5 miles away. Gatlinburg is also nearby, so you can easily explore either charming mountain town. Have dinner, play at area attractions, do some shopping, or hike in the Great Smoky Mountains National Park with your group!

Community pool access is provided and managed through a third party. Host is not liable for amenity availability, maintenance, downtime, or pool closures under any circumstances.

listing_name: Angel Haven - Serene Mountain Views!
description:
Did someone say private indoor pool?! Angel Haven has what you seek. Not only does this 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom cabin boasts tons of fun amenities to keep everyone entertained, but it also features comforts of home, spacious decks with rolling mountain views, and — of course — a private indoor pool where year-round swims are welcome! Not to mention, guests here can swim outdoors in summer through Sherwood Forest Resort.

The space
Private pool, mountain views, and game room galore — this luxury cabin in Sherwood Forest offers the ultimate retreat for families or groups looking to relax, play, and make lasting memories in the Smokies.

🛋️ Living Room
Surrounded by soaring ceilings, warm wood interiors, and expansive windows, this living space offers the perfect place to gather. Cozy up by the fireplace or catch a game on the big screen.

• Leather sofas with plenty of room to spread out
• Stacked stone gas fireplace for chilly evenings
• 55-inch 4K smart TV + premium cable + Blu-ray player
• Open to kitchen and dining area for easy flow
• Natural light and wooded views through large windows

🍳 Kitchen + Dining
Whether you're flipping pancakes or prepping dinner for a crowd, the kitchen has everything you need. There’s even a Keurig and optional in-cabin breakfast delivery for laid-back
mornings.

• Full kitchen with major appliances and cookware
• Dinnerware and glassware for 16
• Keurig K525 and drip coffeemaker
• 8-person dining table with padded bench
• Breakfast bar + living room seating nearby for overflow

🎮 Game Room Loft
The loft-style rec space is packed with games for every age. It's a hub for family fun, overlooking the main living area while still offering room to spread out.

• Pool table, air hockey, and arcade console
• Board game table + Xbox One S with 4K playback
• 50-inch 4K smart TV for game or movie nights
• Pub table for drinks or cards
• Sleeper sofa for extra guests

🎬 Theater Room
Level up your movie nights with this full theater setup. Leather recliners, surround sound, and even a wet bar mean you won’t want to leave.

• 75-inch 4K smart 3D TV + surround sound system
• Blu-ray + 3D + 4K movie collection
• Leather seating for 9 + carpet space for kids
• Wet bar with mini fridge and Sonic-style ice maker
• Pub table seating for 4

🏊 Private Indoor Pool
Rain or shine, you can swim year-round in the cabin’s private pool. Relax poolside or enjoy the view through the windows as you soak in the fun.

• 10x18 ft pool, 3.5 ft deep
• Indoor heated space with towels provided
• Seating for non-swimmers or drinks/snacks
• Large windows with scenic mountain views

🛏️ Bedrooms + Bathrooms
With space for up to 16 guests, the sleeping arrangements are perfect for large groups. Each bedroom includes a TV and access to full bathrooms.

• Bedroom 1: King bed + en-suite with tub/shower combo
• Bedroom 2: King bed + en-suite with 5-ft shower and seat
• Bedroom 3: Queen bed + queen-over-queen bunk + tub/shower combo
• Two queen sleeper sofas in loft and living room
• 3 total bathrooms + TVs + plenty of storage

🌄 Outdoor Spaces
Take in STUNNING VIEWS from both covered decks. Whether you’re rocking with a cup of coffee or soaking in the hot tub, the Smokies never disappoint.

• 4 rocking chairs on upper deck
• Hot tub with starry mountain views
• Charcoal grill for cookouts
• Covered outdoor seating with plenty of privacy
• Motorcycle-friendly access

🧺 Extra Amenities
Angel Haven includes all the essentials and then some, with a few thoughtful extras to keep things convenient during your stay.

• High speed Wi-Fi for browsing or streaming
• Full-size washer and dryer
• USB charging stations in every bedroom
• Weather radios on each floor
• Community outdoor pool access is available in the summer

description:
Welcome to the Smoky Mountains! Our vacation home, AlpenRose is a private three-bedroom, two-bath cozy 1100 square foot log cabin. Sleeping 6, all of the bedrooms feature queen-sized beds & comfortable pillows. We also offer a beautiful 6 person dining room with walls of windows, & a hot tub large enough for your entire family.

AlpenRose Cabin is secluded for privacy but also part of a resort community with seasonal amenities and all the modern necessities for a comfy stay. Book Today!

The space
BEDROOMS, BATHROOMS, AND LIVING:
The first bedroom is found on the main floor and features a jacuzzi tub and a queen sized Zinus brand mattress, with access to a private bath. Upstairs, you'll find the two other bedrooms complete with queen sized Nectar brand mattresses and pillows. Guests also have access to a shared bath upstairs as well. Keep warm during the winter months by settling in around the stone-stacked wood fireplace in the living room. In the Living Room, cozy up on our comfy couch and rocker recliner after a long day of hiking. (Fires are allowed only October 1st - May 1st). We also provide luggage racks for your suitcases.

KITCHEN AND DINING:
The Kitchen is fully-equipped and the dining area has a dining table that comfortably seats six, and the glass window walls provide stunning views and plenty of natural light. Our coffee maker is your standard 12 cup drip style for those laid back mornings. There is a brand new propane grill for additional cooking located on the main level deck. (Please make sure to return the grill cover back to the grill after clean up). Our main level deck also provides a new hot tub to accommodate your entire family, a brand new custom spacious picnic table, and plenty of chairs to relax and enjoy your home cooked meal with a view.

listing_name: Mountain Cabin Home
description:
Mountain cabin with rustic/industrial decor. One bedroom is Beach inspired while second bedroom is romantic with black and white decor. Each bedroom has large spa tub. Full bathroom in each bedroom. Washer and dryer. Back deck elevated with scenic forest views. Cabin is one and a half miles from main road, Parkway, but remote from traffic. Very close to all attractions. Dollywood two miles away. Gatlinburg seven miles away. Alpine Coaster next door. Private but close to all the action!

The space
I am so happy to have this cabin. I’m also happy to share. Sometimes just sitting on the front porch is all I need. There is a Bluetooth speaker in the cabin for Happy Music. Most people in the cabins are temporary renters except the house on the hill in front of my cabin. Enjoy the solitude and the action.

Guest access
Anybody who wants to wander in the woods welcome. Bears are hibernating now. Some foxes, turkeys, feral cats and I’ve been told coyotes but haven’t seen any.

Other things to note
Have a wonderful girl, Jamie, who cleans between visits. Please be kind!

listing_name: Hot Tub, 5-min to The Island, 15-min to Dollywood
description:
Escape to our 3-level log cabin in the Smoky Mountains! Perfectly located minutes from Dollywood & Gatlinburg, this cozy retreat comfortably fits families or groups. Enjoy a private hot tub, stone fireplace, game room, and jacuzzi tub. Experience the ideal blend of mountain charm and convenience in Pigeon Forge. Easy access with no steep roads.

The space
Step into the warm, rustic ambiance of a true Smoky Mountain log cabin. Our home is designed for comfort and entertainment across three spacious levels.

Main Living Area: Features vaulted ceilings and a beautiful stone fireplace, creating a cozy atmosphere for relaxing evenings.
Bedrooms & Bathrooms: Two comfortable bedrooms and 2.5 bathrooms. One bathroom includes a large indoor jacuzzi tub for ultimate relaxation.
Fully-Equipped Kitchen: Comes with everything you need to prepare delicious home-cooked meals.
Game Room: A dedicated entertainment space with a foosball table for friendly competition.
Outdoor Living: Relax on the spacious deck or enjoy the screened-in porch, which features your private hot tub, perfect for soaking your cares away in any weather.

While Eagles Ridge is a quite and safe community, the parking also features a security camera OUTSIDE to monitor the parking/entrance for the protection of our guests and property. There are NO INSIDE cameras.

Guest access
Guests will have private and exclusive access to the entire 3-level cabin and all its amenities. You are not sharing the property with anyone.

Private Entrance: Enjoy the convenience and security of a keyless entry system. A unique door code will be provided prior to your arrival for easy self-check-in and checkout.

Other things to note
Parking is in front of the cabin, and has room for about 2 full size vehicles.
Security: For the protection of our guests and property, an external security camera is located at the front porch, monitoring the parking area and entryway. There are no cameras inside the cabin.

listing_name: Bella Vista - Rustic Cabin with Mountain Views
description:
Welcome to Bella Vista, a peaceful mountain-view cabin tucked high in the hills of Gatlinburg. Secluded and scenic, this 1-bedroom + loft retreat invites up to 6 guests to unwind, unplug, and reconnect. Sip morning coffee on the deck, play pool with friends in the loft, and spend evenings soaking in the hot tub or curled up by the fireplace. Your Smoky Mountain escape begins here.

The space
LIVING ROOM
Gather in the cozy living space, where large windows frame treetop views and vaulted ceilings add to the open feel. A plush suede couch and recliner invite you to relax after outdoor adventures. Enjoy a fire, flip on the TV, or curl up with a good book in this inviting space.
•Big screen TV with DVD player
• Wood-burning fireplace
• Plush couch and recliner
• Reading lamps and side tables
• Natural light and wooded views

KITCHEN + DINING
The charming kitchen and dining area make meals easy and enjoyable. Prepare anything from midnight snacks to full Southern dinners with all the tools you need. Brew coffee, mix cocktails, and share meals at the outdoor table or dine indoors.
• Full-size refrigerator, stove, oven, microwave
• Coffeemaker and blender
• Plates, utensils, glassware, cookware
• Dining table for 4
• Open layout to the living room

BEDROOMS + BATHROOMS
Retreat to peaceful sleep spaces with mountain motif decor and comfort in mind. Each bedroom features a king-size bed and direct access to a bathroom with a jetted tub for spa-like evenings.
• 1 enclosed bedroom with a king-size bed
• 1 loft bedroom with a king-size bed
• 1 queen sleeper sofa in the living room
• 2 indoor jetted tubs
• Flatscreen TVs + DVD players in both bedrooms
• Closets, dressers, bedside lamps

RECREATION
Head upstairs to the loft rec room for games and mountain views. It’s the perfect spot to relax, laugh, and unwind without ever leaving the cabin.
• Full-size pool table
• Bar-style seating
• CD player
• Overlooks the living room and forest views

OUTDOOR SPACES
Step onto the deck and breathe in the fresh mountain air. Soak in the hot tub, grill out, or simply relax with a cup of coffee or glass of wine while enjoying the peaceful surroundings.
• Outdoor hot tub with mountain views
• Lounge chairs and patio table with an umbrella
• Charcoal grill
• Scenic views of the Smoky Mountain forestry
• Located at the end of a steep gravel drive

OTHER AMENITIES
Bella Vista offers convenient extras so you can settle in and stay awhile. Note that data on the mobile hotspot is limited, so streaming should be minimized.
• Mobile hotspot (limited data)
• Over 1,600 square feet
• Peaceful location near the top of the mountain

NEARBY ATTRACTIONS
• Handmade Pottery in Gatlinburg – 7.4 miles
• Ober Gatlinburg Ski Area – 9.2 miles
• The Island in Pigeon Forge – 8.1 miles
• The Old Mill Square – 7.8 miles
• Great Smoky Mountains National Park – 6.5 miles
• Dollywood Theme Park – 9.5 miles
• Spring Wildflower Pilgrimage (April) – 6.2 miles

listing_name: Sleeps 12 • 2 Min to Parkway • No Steep Roads
description:
Hoedown Hideaway is a premium cabin rental in a prime location just a half mile off the Pigeon Forge Parkway. Most of the area’s top attractions and restaurants are just minutes away!

Inside, the open-concept layout is designed for togetherness, giving your family plenty of space to relax and connect. With 2,500 square feet of living space, the cabin offers comfort and privacy, featuring three bedrooms and three bathrooms thoughtfully positioned on separate floors.

The space
Hoedown Hideaway | Central Pigeon Forge Cabin Near Parkway, Dollywood & Smokies

Welcome to Hoedown Hideaway, a spacious Pigeon Forge cabin rental located just ½ mile off the Parkway, placing you in the center of the area’s most popular attractions, restaurants, and entertainment. The Parkway is the main corridor through Pigeon Forge and your direct route to Gatlinburg and Great Smoky Mountains National Park, making this cabin an ideal base for your Smoky Mountain vacation.

This 2,500 sq ft multi-level cabin is thoughtfully designed for families and groups who want to be close to everything while still enjoying space, privacy, and comfort. The open-concept main living area makes it easy to gather, while **three bedrooms and three bathrooms—each on separate floors—**provide privacy for every guest.

Why Guests Love Hoedown Hideaway:
-Prime Pigeon Forge location near the Parkway
-Just minutes to Dollywood, The Island, dinner shows & shopping
-Easy drive to Gatlinburg & Great Smoky Mountains National Park
-2,500 sq ft of space across multiple levels
-3 bedrooms / 3 bathrooms, each on its own floor
-Open floor plan perfect for families and groups
-Quiet setting while staying close to attractions
-Ideal for family vacations, reunions, and group trips

Sleeping Arrangements:
-Bedroom 1: Private bedroom with adjacent full bathroom
-Bedroom 2: Spacious private bedroom on its own level
-Bedroom 3: Private bedroom with full bath on a separate floor
-Each bedroom offers privacy and comfort, perfect for multiple couples or families traveling together

Living, Dining & Kitchen:
-Large open living area with comfortable seating
-Fully equipped kitchen with cookware, dishes, and essentials
-Dining area perfect for family meals and game nights
-Open layout allows everyone to relax and connect together

Location Highlights – Walkable Convenience Without the Noise

Hoedown Hideaway puts you minutes from everything Pigeon Forge is known for:
-Dollywood & Dollywood Splash Country
-The Island in Pigeon Forge
-Top dinner shows & live entertainment
-Restaurants, shopping, and outlet malls
-Scenic drive into Gatlinburg
-Hiking, waterfalls, and wildlife in the Smokies

Whether you’re planning a family vacation, friends getaway, or Smoky Mountains adventure, Hoedown Hideaway delivers the space, comfort, and unbeatable location guests search for on Airbnb.

Good to Know
-No pets
-No smoking
-Easy year-round access
-Central yet peaceful location

description:
Plan YOUR next memorable family vacation, trip with friends, or group retreat where It’s All Good in the Great Smoky Mountains! This pet-friendly, 4-bedroom, 4-bathroom cabin rental with mountain views in Pigeon Forge, Tennessee, offers space for up to 14 guests plus an array of amenities to keep everyone entertained. At the cabin, lounge by the electric fireplace in the living room, cook up a storm in the fully equipped kitchen, and set the dining table for mealtimes together in this open-concept space with a wall of windows overlooking the rolling hills. With two full bathrooms, including a master with a garden tub and shower, you'll find comfort and convenience.

Experience the convenience of upgraded WiFi services, enhancing your connectivity and enjoyment throughout your stay in our units. Stay effortlessly connected and entertained with our high-speed internet access.

The outdoor pool boasts a playful mushroom water feature, perfect for the enjoyment of children or even yourself, and is heated typically in April and May, depending on the outside temperature. The indoor pool maintains an inviting temperature and is heated year-round. Our resort presents an abundance of space, featuring several gathering and picnic areas, along with outdoor grills. A highlight is our newest amenity – a quarter-mile walking trail on our expansive five-acre green space. The grounds further showcase a variety of outdoor activities, such as tetherball, a volleyball court, horseshoes, two playgrounds, a basketball court, and shuffleboard. The sprawling area ensures an enjoyable experience for both you and your children! All buildings at our resort feature elevators for accessibility. Units are wheelchair accessible. Each unit offers free parking for your car.

The fully stocked kitchen encompasses a refrigerator/freezer, dishwasher, microwave, and stove/oven. We supply dishes, glassware, pot and pan sets, a toaster, a blender, and a coffee maker. For specialized items such as a wok, rice steamer, or crockpot, we recommend bringing your own, as these are not provided. Enjoy complimentary amenities, including free Wi-Fi, cable TV in the rooms, and local phone service. Sheets and towel sets are provided for your stay, though they cannot be changed out. A full washer and dryer are also available in this unit. While we provide a single-use box of detergent, you may wish to bring extra if you plan to do laundry. An iron and ironing board are included. This resort is pet-free, smoke-free, and strictly prohibits trailers.

As a token of our appreciation for choosing Hazelrig Enterprises, you'll receive one free admission daily to popular attractions, including Dollywood, Hatfield & McCoy Feud and Dinner Show, and The Pirate Show Dinner Show. No timeshare presentations or mandatory purchases are involved in this program. A stay with us entitles you to 1 ticket choice per day of stay from an activities package totaling $1,059 with our partner Xplorie.

Conveniently positioned on Plaza Drive between traffic lights 0 and 1, directly behind Country Tonight in the entertainment district, our resort provides easy access to a trolley stop at the main road, offering rides throughout Pigeon Forge for a nominal fee of $.50. Dollywood, softball fields, and The Island, featuring Margaritaville and Paula Deen's, are approximately 2 miles away.

Please note that trailer or car hauler parking is strictly prohibited, and alternative arrangements can be coordinated through property management.

Check-in is hassle-free – simply show up after the designated time and enter the provided code to unlock the door. This unit is located in Building 2 on the 5th floor, offering spectacular views. Public parking and a trolley stop at the bottom of the hill facilitate easy access to various attractions in Pigeon Forge for a nominal fee of $.50. Embark on your extraordinary vacation with us!

Guest access
All guests of the resort have FREE access to all these amenities which are ONLY found at our resort. We strive to make your stay one to remember!

listing_name: A Bears View - Ft. Bonus Loft Bed & New Hot Tub!
description:
A Bears View - Starr Crest Resort

The space
A Bears View is a beautiful two story cabin located in the Starr Crest Resort with a perfect combination view of the Pigeon Forge city lights and a backdrop of Bluff Mountain. A designated driveway is offered specific to this cabin with a charcoal grill and a sealed trash bin located right outside as well. Once the car is unloaded and you've climbed the 7 steps needed to reach the front door of this cabin, your temporary home away from home awaits you!

Upon entering the cabin, you are greeted with a fully stocked kitchen consisting of cookware, dinnerware, bakeware, and full-sized appliances, everything needed to create delicious meals for your friends and family, as well as offering a washer/dryer unit attached to this space to assist with the very common overpacking habit. Continuing through the cabin, you will find an open layout displaying the dining and living room areas that provide multiple options for quality time to be spent, whether that's gathering around the table enjoying conversations with your loved ones or getting comfortable on the couch, sitting around the cozy fireplace while watching a movie on the flat screen TV. Passed the living area, you'll come upon the entrance to the private, main floor bedroom featuring a king-sized bed, flat screen TV, double-sided gas fireplace shared with the living room space, and attached bathroom. The main floor bathroom, accessible only through the bedroom, is a full bathroom showcasing a beautifully tiled, double-headed, walk-in shower for that luxury affect. Once you make your way out of the bedroom and back into the living room, you will come across a door that leads right out to the main level deck offering plenty of seating to overlook the gorgeous view.

Now to climb the spiral staircase making your way up to the second floor of this cabin, you will be introduced to a spaciously shared floorplan including the game area, open loft 2nd bedroom, and another spiral staircase that leads up to the bonus loft area. This bonus loft space, located above the second floor loft bedroom, contains a full-sized bed and is a feature specific to this cabin alone, a wonderful addition for guests who need the extra sleeping arrangements for kids. On this floor you will also have a second bathroom to use that does not only offer another beautiful tiled walk-in shower option, but also provides a jetted Jacuzzi tub for a romantic evening with your significant other or a fun and easy bath time for the kids. The loft bedroom offers a king-sized bed and a flat screen TV, however, should you wish to turn off the TV and partake in a fun and competitive game instead, you have multiple options to choose from in the attached game area as it comes equipped with a Pool Table, Foosball Table, Air Hockey Table, and a Multicade system with tons of old school arcade games to choose from. After checking out everything this floor has to offer, the last feature to consider is the 2nd level deck that gives you access to the best view this cabin can offer. Enjoying the beautiful scenery while sitting on a rocking chair or in your private Hot Tub is sure to make this experience that much more relaxing. We honestly feel A Bears View is sure to take care of all of your vacation lodging needs!

listing_name: Butterfly Kisses - Porch Privacy ft. New Hot Tub!
description:
Butterfly Kisses - Starr Crest Resort

The space
Butterfly Kisses

Other things to note
- Not a secluded cabin. Due to being located in a resort setting, there are neighboring cabins to be mindful of. 
- This cabin is located right across the street from the playground and pavilion area.
- ALL 1 BEDROOM CABINS ARE NOT ADVERTISED TO DISPLAY ANY VIEWS OFF OF THE PRIVATE DECK; any views advertised in photos are from the driveway area.
-Cabins are easily accessible year-round as the roads are well maintained by the resort staff to provide stress-free travel to all guests. The resort features inclined roads that are paved, wide, and do not require special vehicles or four-wheel drive to navigate, however, should a four-wheel drive vehicle be accessible to you, it would benefit our guests to drive that vehicle when visiting during the winter months in case of snowfall, to be able to access other parts of town comfortably.
- Offers an electric fireplace that is for ambiance purposes only. This fireplace is not advertised as a heating source for the cabin.
- Furnished with Aspen Log Furniture to provide that rustic, but luxurious cabin feel.
- Charcoal for the outdoor grill, kitchen spices/oils for preparing meals in the kitchen, coffee filters for the coffee maker, and clothes hangers for the closets are special items that we would like to point out that we do not provide to guests during their stay. 
- FOR AIRBNB LISTING PURPOSES - We DO provide pots and pans for our guests, however, we DO NOT provide spices and oil.

listing_name: Mountain Splendor - Amazing 5-Star Mountain View!
description:
Mountain Splendor - Starr Crest Resort

The space
Mountain Splendor The perfect name for this 2 story 2 bedroom (1 private & 1 loft) cabin with amazing, breathtaking 180 degree views of Mt. LeConte.

Mountain Splendor was the first cabin developed at the top peak of the Mountain. It is one of the highest occupied cabins in the resort year after year.

As you enter the cabin, the first thing you will notice is that the owner spared no expense. The full kitchen features stainless steel appliances which include refrigerator/ice maker, stove, microwave, and dish-washer. You will also find a blender, coffee maker, and more, all that is necessary to prepare a gourmet meal for two or a hot, satisfying family meal. You will feel as if you are dining on the top of the mountain as you sit at the beautiful dining table with the splendid mountain views all around you.
Snuggle on the sofa in front of the fireplace and watch a movie or retire to the master bedroom where you will find a comfortable king bed. The master bedroom also has its own adjoining full bathroom with tub and shower.
Upstairs in the loft area, you will be greeted with even more breathtaking mountain views from the floor to ceiling windows. You will also find one of the best equipped game rooms in the area, outfitted with a pool table, air hockey, and arcade game for your enjoyment and a second bathroom featuring a 2 person Jacuzzi tub for added luxury and enjoyment.
Oh and did we mention the views? Well we really can’t stress them enough. Imagine sitting in the hot tub with mountain splendor all around you! That is exactly what you will get when you soak in this hot tub!
